majorIds.Old Spark: Whirlwind transforms into a travelling projectile, exploding on contact and knocking enemies into the air. Hold shift to rise with them.

items.lore: recnal il il. alac toc, pasad il, atlruc il, kaclahpokc il cefos. lahes il nikcrolad kec pahsohal uc ifrah tofnikcsif. etlefrofmad ah, etlaces ah tofnikcsoftahal. rofmel lahrakctriltod uc tofpahnuc. lahic cof efrofmad il pahsadiled uc tofifrah. etlalnes ah rofmedes uc tofpestal. pasad uc tofmahatskritsec. etlrakc kec. etlrakc kec.
items.name: Restitution

majorIds.Self-sufficient: Powder Specials can no longer be charged manually, but accumulate 8% charge every second.
Powder Specials can no longer be charged manually, but accumulate 8% charge every second.

majorIds.Oneiro: Your maximum Mana Bank is increased by 50, but your spells now charge it by -3 less per hit.

items.lore: The world is only as small as your heart makes it out to be.
items.name: Dreamer's Soul

majorIds.Self-sufficient: Powder Specials can no longer be charged manually, but accumulate 8% charge every second.
Powder Specials can no longer be charged manually, but accumulate 8% charge every second.
Powder Specials can no longer be charged manually, but accumulate 8% charge every second.

majorIds.Ignition Whirlwind: Blazing Powder adds +8 rotations to spin attack, but lowers the damage by 75%.

items.lore: With each swing, this ornate hammer threatens to shape mountains and carve valleys, cleaving new fault lines in a single blow.
items.name: Planet Buster

majorIds.Dauntless Inferno: Courage casts a series of 5 infernos that expand after the last, dealing 125% each, and grants 20% resistance instead of a damage boost.

items.lore: Face the flames with resolution in your eyes. Once you're down in the brimstone, you're not going back.
items.name: Hellbound

majorIds.Death Sentence: Courage will immediately combust Guardian Angels, dealing 4000% and enkindling Buckshot's arrows with 20% Main Attack damage.

items.lore: The end comes in threes: first a deep and neverending shadow, suffocating all within its grasp. Then, a piercing blinding radiance, overtaking all within its sight. Finally, the in-between: chaos, bloodshed, war, a conflict which will sweep the land. Each end inevitable; but none a guarantee.
items.name: Eschaton

majorIds.Final Gambit: When Second Chance activates, all allies within 10 blocks of you get a 20% damage boost for 15s.

items.lore: A true tactician knows to throw even himself on the pyre, if it is for the greater good.
items.name: Calculated Sacrifice

items.lore: There is no need to swing this weapon. Your skin crackles as the mere presence of the blade rends the earth beneath it, to falling skies and gaping chasms. Once the dust settles and the air stills, the sword is the only telltale remnant of the catastrophe.
items.name: Crumbler

majorIds.Strings of Fate: Your puppets have a lifetime of 3 seconds and deal 50% increased damage with attacks and explosions.

items.lore: Do you recognize the cries before you? Those so far beneath you, forgotten by time and betrayed by history. Hear their song- of asylum lost and vengeance unfulfilled. Bring them closure.
items.name: Spectral Psalm

items.lore: Originally intended for a more benign purpose, this piece of royal technology has been repurposed by something with far more malicious intentions. Despite the electrified water spraying from it, the smell of death never seems to wash away.
items.name: Arcane Apparatus

items.lore: "Against all heed, to Fruma eternal." The engraving appears extremely weathered.
items.name: Light of The Wings

items.lore: War does not bring destruction. With war comes chaos, and with chaos comes destruction.
items.name: Chaos Theory

items.lore: True artistry takes time... with the power to sculpt mountains and erode cliffsides into panoramas, the beliefs of your enemies are insignificant. They will understand your greatness... in due time.
items.name: Orogenesis

majorIds.Slow Boil: Bakal's Grasp and Enraged Blow have their caps doubled, but Corruption charges 20% as fast.

items.lore: Lose yourself in the climb.
items.name: Folds of Infinity

items.lore: Finally, the pulse of melody and harmony flies through golden halls, flung by the momentum of life itself. A single knock of polished wood on chiselled stone, and the song of the world falls silent.
items.name: Regal Sceptre

items.lore: The swirl of liquid muck drags you further, further down, into the grasping clutches of the gluttonous hands of the sludge. The earth must be fed; preferably, by something less powerful than you.
items.name: Claustropelia

majorIds.Blinding Lights: All Ophanim orbs become closer-range Lightweaver orbs. Using Main Attack causes all orbs to spin faster. Crystallize stacks are reduced by -2 per hit.

items.lore: As a flashing star shot through the night sky, a sole observer witnessed its brilliance. It was then, wreathed in prismatic light, he decided. Someday, he would shine as bright as that star, and overtake those beneath him. No matter the cost.
items.name: Halcyon

items.lore: The mirror at the core of this artefact reflects back an image of a citadel that does not exist anywhere on this planet.
items.name: Lunar Acropolis

majorIds.Disassociate: You can now have twice the Nightcloak Knives, but they each deal 30% less damage.

items.lore: She wears a dozen masks, each fragile as the surface of a lake. The shards of her discarded personage are sharp enough to kill.
items.name: Incognito

majorIds.Flain Remnants: Destroying a Puppet with Friendly Fire calls forth a Remnant. (Max 5) Each Remnant lasts for 20 seconds, fires an explosive tracking projectile every second that deals 95%, and increases your Main Attack damage by 15%.

items.lore: Desperation breeds creativity. What would it take to force your will upon the world? To bend and break and weave existence, to bypass the immutable? The result is different, wrong, anathema to your being... but it is freedom from the chains that bind you. It is enough.
items.name: Transfiguration

items.lore: Soldiers and sorcerers, mere men who think themselves judgement. Not so. Judgement is beyond the sword, beyond the staff; justice prefers different weapons. There is nothing, nothing at all, out of its reach.
items.name: Jurisdiction

items.lore: There was glory in this place, once. Life, vitality, springing forth from every well and boulder. No longer. All that remains now is death, and a fleeting memory of that which once was.
items.name: Retired Vigour

items.lore: Pitch black and tipped with golden bands, it appears to grow at its wielder's whim. Strange runes are etched into the side, that flash with a heavenly light.
items.name: Golden Staff

majorIds.Solar Wind: Thunderstorm disables Meteor and grants +3 thunderbolts, +3 radius and deal 100% and 110% each. Unstable now activates on Thunderstorm for 400% bonus damage.

items.lore: From afar, a faint light glimmers. A brighter light next. Another. Then another still. A cascade of blinding force, more than anything you could have ever imagined. And then... nothing. As though there was never anything there.
items.name: Starcaller

majorIds.Manic Edge: While vanished, lose 5% of your max mana per second. Increase Surprise Strike's damage bonus by 5% per mana lost from this effect, up to 130%.

items.lore: A strength fueled by rage, merciless, unending. A hatred, all-consuming, that erodes all other thought, all sense of being. An ally so fickle, so selfish, that leaves you aimless at the moment of pyrrhic triumph.
items.name: Vengeance

majorIds.Furious Effigy: Totem effects are twice as fast, but duration is halved.

items.lore: The whispers crescendo to cackles, creeping cries clouding your mind. You can't think. They eat away at the edges of your consciousness. You can't think. It's too loud in your brain. You can't think.
items.name: Scattered Psyche

items.lore: Only years of training, of building tolerance, has allowed you resistance to the onslaught; channeling the unstoppability of a torrent unleashed. Your enemy stands no chance.
items.name: Hydrotoxemia

items.lore: This pike carries an insatiable momentum. The blade darts through the air, slicing through the wind with a speed so great the air screams in protest, a roaring echo to be heard miles away.
items.name: Sonic Wave

items.lore: The frozen drops lashing your skin. The roar of the wind filling your ears. You've mastered it all. You can shape the winds, direct the rain. You are the storm.
items.name: Breath of the Skies

items.lore: To drag into shadow. To stifle in darkness. Anything is possible with total, suffocating eclipse at your beck and call.
items.name: Umbral Anchor

items.lore: This ornate knife, which fell from Ahmsord centuries ago, is still followed by the shadows of the void, blotting out the sun in a wide area around it. Bathed in the darkness of twilight, you finally feel truly liberated, as no soul will ever see the horrors you commit.
items.name: Occultation

items.lore: It invites you to ride on the warm, soothing gusts it summons. It calls for you to admire the fires it leaves behind, burning the land to a char in its wake. It offers a lifetime of protection, while weaving a tapestry of flames across the world.
items.name: Frenetic Firestorm

majorIds.Lightning Crash: Dash becomes a downward dive. Ripple has tripled height amplification and deals 250% and 100%.

items.lore: Abandon your fear. Look forward. Move forward and never stop. Retreat and you will age. Hesitate and you will die.
items.name: Slaying Moon

majorIds.Stagnant Air: Air Shout gains doubled area and damage, but is delayed with decreased velocity and hit rate.

items.lore: The show is about to begin.
items.name: Bated Breath

items.lore: A string so subtle it can slip by the walls of reality, bringing its targets into the space beyond space itself.
items.name: Nihil

items.lore: The world is a well of wonder. To open your eyes each day is the greatest gift that can be given. The strength of a thousand lives flows through your veins, and the world embraces you with a reckless, terrible, beautiful, incredible power.
items.name: Ehrfurcht

items.lore: Linked by blood, common cause, or pure fate, the clan is an immutable unit. Hundreds of hearts, beating as one, a collective pulse with the power to shake the world to its core.
items.name: Faction

items.lore: To hunt in the Mistwoods is always an opportunity. Perhaps hidden between the trees, behind the shrubs, above the canopy, or even within the shadows just behind you, mirroring your every step.
items.name: Mistweb Spinner

items.lore: The storm is a wicked beast, built of buffeting gales and electric agony. But at the very heart of the tempest lies a sanctuary, a blink of respite, where the waves run radiant in every hue.
items.name: Brilliant Waves

majorIds.Seeking Module: Homing Shots track towards nearby enemies much more aggressively.

items.lore: They tense. They know they must hide. The bow will see to it. You will seek. You will find them. The bow will see to it. They will heed your call. They will know your face. The bow will see to it.
items.name: Mark of the Huntsman

items.lore: Trapped within the deep reaches of the void holes for millenia, this ancient relic has been unrecognizably warped by its own nonexistence. Instead of integrating back to reality upon its return, it brings with it the manic dissociation from a world that cannot be understood.
items.name: Incoherence

items.lore: A hissing, cracking harmony swells, a maddening chorus to blare across the broken plains, yet still: unseen and alive, it swells with the beat of the earth, still breathing, still killing.
items.name: Toxic Spike

majorIds.Chaos Reach: Blood Sorrow spends 20 less points of Blood Pool and inflicts enemies with 0.3 seconds of Bleeding per hit, but no longer grants overhealth.

items.lore: A rage unseen, yet so beautiful, that when you laid your eyes upon it, you knew it had to be unleashed. No matter the cost.
items.name: Latent Disorder

items.lore: To quell the most hateful energies, to focus the most erratic wills, to understand the most alien voices, to shake the most uncaring forces, to capture the most ephemeral potential. The final work of many scholars: to command the world in its most pure being.
items.name: Horamancer

items.lore: I can't see this through to the end. I have to put my trust in you to finish it.
items.name: Ellipsism

items.lore: A defiant pang joins the ruckus, a tune to run counter to the pain and the chaos of the rest. The strings of the forest are played just so, and the fall of each leaf echoes in an enchanted rhythm.
items.name: Firemoss Lyre

majorIds.Incision Elegy: Lacerate becomes a forward-moving projectile, but no longer lunges.

items.lore: Just another song and dance.
items.name: Carole

majorIds.Divine Right: Sacred Surge's damage is increased by 1% (Maximum 200%) for every 200 max HP you have when it triggers.

items.lore: There is very little outside the purview of those with power. No matter the circumstance, those in a higher position can, will, and have justified their actions in different ways. Some reasons are fine, some are weak. But what sort of justification is there, for those in the highest position? You have the floor.
items.name: Ascendancy

items.lore: Infiltrating a mind is tricky business; warping its thoughts, taking its wishes. It requires precision, skill, and more than a fair bit of luck.
items.name: Dreamstealer

items.lore: The power of the unknown. The mysteries hidden in dark corners, between the walls; the forgotten poems, the renounced names, the words spoken into the abyss and never heard again. Meld them, wield them; they are yours to command.
items.name: Arcana

majorIds.Gunk Shot: Shocking Bomb's velocity is doubled but loses -66% radius. Arrow Bomb and Grape Bomb suffer a -20% damage penalty.

items.lore: Archers have often experimented with tipped arrows. Launching the substance itself, however, is an innovation. A viscous ooze corrosive to anything it touches, it remains to be seen if their remains will be seen.
items.name: Biohazard

items.lore: He never dies.
items.name: Techno-Blade

items.lore: Excessive force is an ideal to strive for. Disproportionate violence is your right to protect.
items.name: Inordinate

majorIds.Fissure: Ice Snake moves much more slowly, but deals massive knockback, 275%, and 155%.

items.lore: The stones have a language. You can learn to direct their shiftings and discover their names; all you must do in return is forget your own.
items.name: Tectonics

majorIds.Regicide: Your projectiles and abilities deal more damage the further away you are from your target, by 2% per block, up to a cap of 120%

items.lore: A boiling rage has been gathering, the pain of an entire empire yearning to be freed. With all the power of the downtrodden and the overlooked and the starved, you echo out a shout with ten thousand voices, each too quiet to hear by itself, but together a catastrophic force to make the heavens cower.
items.name: Revolution

items.lore: The real power in madness comes not from some supernatural vigour, but from a sudden lack of interest in self-preservation, and the ensuing ability to do whatever you want.
items.name: Lunacy

majorIds.Napalm: Fire Creep increases Arrow Bomb damage by +15%, but deals 15 times the self-damage and lowers velocity. Scorched Earth radius is increased and deals +65%.

items.lore: Gunpowder is your favourite scent. It signals peace: the enemies have been blown to high hell. And who doesn't love peace?
items.name: Firebomb

majorIds.Unstable Reaction: Judrajim no longer ramps in damage after each hit. When it expires, it releases 115% of its potential in an explosion.

items.lore: A mage by the name of Lero claims to have harnessed the sheer power of lightning using a magical staff, however, the weapon is very unreliable in a pinch.
items.name: Fatal

items.lore: The melody hardens, groaning and clanking, a clash of iron on steel and a shout from a thousand trampled mouths in unison. It burns and breaks, a roar of unbridled power.
items.name: Scrap Cannon

items.lore: It has witnessed the rise and fall of thousands of civilizations. It has observed the birth and death of millions of stars. It has seen universes open and close. It watches... as each second of eternity passes.
items.name: Invariant

majorIds.Transcendence: 25% chance for spells to cost no mana when casted.

items.lore: Spiritual enlightenment is a goal that many monks hope to one day grasp the barest glimpse of, often thought to be a goal that must be worked towards over a lifetime. Holding this polished, translucent blade will instantly induce that lofty state until it is let go.
items.name: Nirvana

majorIds.Net Shot: Bryophyte Roots is now triggered from Buckshot, doubling its slowness and damage.

majorIds.Wavebreak: Meteor's  damage is replaced by  damage. Psychokinesis can bounce up to 5 times, dealing 100% and 50% area damage, as well as 200% and 100% direct hit damage, increasing by 10% after each bounce. Mana Bank gains -3 less mana from Meteor.

items.lore: The waves are not like men; they do not brazenly assault and catastrophically fail. They do not burn fast and wink out. They bide their time, they wait, and they encroach upon the world with an insidious, unstoppable force, dragging you away to the dark side of the sea.
items.name: Riptide

items.lore: The depths bring stability, order, security. Those above are weak, unable to withstand the pressure. Those below are concerned with what lies further down. Leave your lawlessness, your chaos, your delusions of freedom. Open yourself to the abyss.
items.name: Abyssopelagic

items.lore: The Elves managed to harness the power of air itself, forming a bow made entirely of air currents, allowing the user to move swift like the wind, but vulnerable to attacks.
items.name: Stratiformis

majorIds.Combo Stomp: Landing directly on an enemy with Fierce Stomp sends you back into the air and resets Escape.

items.lore: There's an inscription written hastily lining the edge of the blade: "Before it is over, I will see you again... but I have been called. And I must answer."
items.name: Allegiance

items.lore: Empty threats, thrilling bluffs, false promises: a little bravado goes a long way. Wielded properly, diction can be just as fatal as a knife to the heart, and it's much cleaner besides.
items.name: Charlatan

majorIds.Gentle Glow: Orphion's Pulse restores up to 25% more max health to allies, but heals at a slower rate. Fluid Healing's effectiveness is increased by 150%.

items.lore: Under the waters, between the waves, there lies something-something beautiful.
items.name: Apsara

majorIds.Lit Fuse: Friendly Fire now works on Totem as well. When Totem's timer runs out, it explodes, firing 5 beams in all directions, each dealing 500%.

items.lore: "Skin worked so thin, we see the bone; she grinds us up from on her throne. Their houses made of flimsy steel; scars from bombs will never heal."
items.name: Renegade Bomber

majorIds.Guardian: Devout Union gains +20% damage redirection and +4 radius.

items.lore: A vow of protection hangs over this spear, now inhabited by the spirit of a legendary heroine. Even simply a glimpse of the burning blade will instill a feeling of protection and security, and that feeling will hold true if one is brave enough to wield it.
items.name: Guardian

majorIds.Living Museum: Players within 10 blocks of Mirage, Shadow, or Another Self clones will get 20% resistance, and be healed 10%, 20%, or 50% max health when the respective clone is destroyed.

items.lore: Allies are exhausting, with their egos and beliefs, and pesky moral codes. Followers are much better-soldiers in your own perfect image, whose deaths are merely scaffolds to a world of your design.
items.name: Architect

items.lore: You do not recognize this place. A labyrinth of foreign walls closes in on you. Paths you have walked a thousand times now alien. Are these your hands? They are made of unfamiliar flesh.
items.name: Jamais Vu

majorIds.Lightweight: You no longer take fall damage.

items.lore: When one has climbed the highest mountain, traversed the vastest plain, what is left to conquer? One challenges the human limit, and attempts to push beyond what any has accomplished before. Sculpted in honor of the first champion, this idol emboldens you to best your greatest opponent: yourself.
items.name: Olympic

items.lore: A curious prototype from the labs of Sock Brewing, simply looking at this liquored effigy begins to induce vertigo, tipsiness, and then shortly afterward the ever-familiar mania which only drink can inspire.
items.name: Inebriation

majorIds.River of Souls: Phantom Ray gains massive radius, but reduced damage by 20%.

items.lore: Do you ... really expect to be able to steal, or even touch, a single drop from that holiest-and cruelest-of springs?
items.name: Stygian Spiral

majorIds.Oneself Unto All: Radiance's radius extends 4 blocks beyond Bash and buffs allies with your stats instead of theirs

items.lore: Sever every last impurity of the self, and bring to fruition a brilliant culmination of 'you'.
items.name: Ego

majorIds.Starcrossed: Hitting an enemy with Haunting Memory makes it Linked. You can have up to two targets Linked at once. When one Linked enemy takes damage, the other Linked enemy takes that damage as well.

items.lore: A brilliant waltz on the razor's edge. Dance, dance through the fields of broken bodies and the vacant cities of empty people. Become the inevitable; the hands of time announce your interminable arrival. Raise your symphony to a crescendo, now: you are the dealer, and fate is the deck. The whole world will know your song.
items.name: Fate

items.lore: Your soul is stained. Covered in the dirt of deceit and the muck of murder, the sins haunt your every step. Burn it all away, purify your existence in a flash of brilliant light.
items.name: Lustrum

items.lore: Deep, deep below the swirling, suffocating muck and the things that slither and crawl in the dark, there is a pulse. A wild, churning, erratic pulse, beating ever so quickly to the tempo of the earth, waiting to be unleashed.
items.name: Substrate

majorIds.Heartbeat: Arrow Shield is set to 2 charges but deals doubled damage. Arrow Wall instead triples Arrow Shield damage and doubles Guardian Angels ammo.

items.lore: The hands of destiny tighten and slacken without remorse, pulling hearts together only to push them apart in a relentless dance.
items.name: Tug of Fate

majorIds.Flurry of Blows: Turn Double Slice into a 10-hit pummeling of 16% damage per hit.

items.lore: Wielding this molten sword, you feel your worries and empathy combust away into corrosive smoke. If one can feel so free, why should it matter if it comes to the detriment of the world around you?
items.name: Pollution

majorIds.Juggle: Mutilate adds an additional 12 hits. All hits are reduced by -10%.

items.lore: Roll the dice, hit a match. You never miss.
items.name: Lucky Strike

items.lore: The song of the world begins as a quiet whistle, calm and peaceful, wrapping 'round the trees and drifting lazily across the fields. It is ever so soft, yet sharper than any sword.
items.name: Petal Blade

majorIds.Cherry Bombs: Turns Smoke Bomb into firecrackers that fly farther, tighter, and deal 100%, 30%, 30%, and 30% instantly.

items.lore: This artefact begins deteriorating your flesh from the moment it touches your skin, but its destructive force can be channeled to rot the bodies of any who come near.
items.name: Degenerator

items.lore: Holding this staff, you feel less . . . physical. Less real. The wind blows through you, blows past you, as though this world wasn't meant for you at all.
items.name: Incorporeal

items.lore: This spear comes alive in your hands. It whispers strategy and technique to you, a voice that cuts through the clash of metal and screams of the dying. It is always correct. It has only ever lost a single battle. Do not let it down.
items.name: Tactician

majorIds.Gruesome Knots: Bleeding and Twisted Tether deal double damage, but Bleeding duration is reduced.

items.lore: A dusty old tome, containing all the powers of the abyss. From its pages spring forth the blackest of secrets and the darkest of truths. Do not let yourself slip into its grasp, for it will consume you too.
items.name: Demonomicon

items.lore: Beauty and fragility go hand in hand. As nature's blossoms and branches are delightful, so are they delicate. A single spark can set the whole world into glorious blaze.
items.name: Brambleburner

majorIds.Vitriol: Uncontainable Corruption decreases Corrupted duration by 75% and gives drastically more damage, but disables Enraged Blow. Massacre adds 5 times as much corruption.

items.lore: For when one needs to carve the smallest stone or pick the smallest lock, the subtleties of precision approach impossibility.
items.name: Infinitesimal

items.lore: From nothing to everything, forever past to forever more, the vastness of eternity is obscured by the sameness of tomorrow.
items.name: Continuum

majorIds.Vedette: Focus gets +10% damage per stack, but caps at 2. Crepuscular Ray can be cast at 2 Focus with decreased Focus drain, launching you into the air and immobilizing you.

items.lore: Strangers held together by shared past, entwined in a fray, never to unite again.
items.name: Divergence

items.lore: To call an end a new beginning implies there ever was a beginning, or ever will be an end.
items.name: Recursion

items.lore: Curious, isn't it, that unending complexity can feel so plain in one's hand, yet pull deeper than eyes can see and minds can fathom?
items.name: Fractal

items.lore: As the void approaches nearer and nearer, the barrier between realms thins almost to a point... And yet, no matter how far you fall or how fast you fly, it will always lie just out of reach. Such is the indeterminate nature of the void, and its power that you harness.
items.name: Convergence

majorIds.Fixate: Distortion decays at a halved rate and Devitalize effects are doubled. However, Distortion effects on abilities are reduced by 40% and Meteor Shower now requires +50% Distortion per Meteor.

items.lore: Down. Your enemies will fall slack. Deeper. Do you know this compulsion you bring? Deeper still. This implement, reaching from within and without. Even deeper. Souls and wills to command at the flex of a finger. Almost gone. It is my compulsion, too great to ignore. It is my implement, too strong to resist. My puppets, too deep to escape. Drop.
items.name: Trance

majorIds.Twisting Threads: Tangled Traps ropes gain +1 range, can overlap up to 3 times, and deal 50%. Gain +12 traps with 66% duration that cannot be triggered by enemies.

items.lore: Left. Right. Left. Right. They are desperate for an escape, merely playthings in a maze of your design. Left. Left. Right. Turn back. When mountains of stone can shift at your command, their world is reduced to a single path. Left. Right. Does it ever end?
items.name: Labyrinth

majorIds.Lifestream: Blood Sorrow has 4 times the damage and overhealth, but its duration is shortened by 75%.

items.lore: The power to join oneself with the lifeblood of the earth has long eluded sects of fanatical druids and shamans. One such cult found a way, and subsequently wiped itself out in the process, their flesh turning to stone and veins forming new rivers.
items.name: Resonance

items.lore: The great serpent of Ahms was said to be a bringer of wisdom in days long past, revered by the inhabitants of the region. Totems like this one were crafted as an act of worship, though as belief faded over time, so too were these idols lost and destroyed. Only one remains.
items.name: Quetzalcoatl

items.lore: Its frame is as that of a horrid maw, its arrows hideous tongues of stone. They reach out, pulling their victims into an acidic embrace. What are they searching, grasping for? Perhaps some questions are wiser to ignore.
items.name: Sulfur Expulser

items.lore: The last of her crimes was against herself. She reviled and hated, shattering any glass in which she might see her own cruel visage.
items.name: Abhorrence

items.lore: Her crimes were against the State. She burned and pillaged, making a mockery of law and civility throughout the land.
items.name: Renegade

items.lore: Her crimes were against Decency. She laughed and spat, denying reason and making the world suffer for small vengeance.
items.name: Petulance

items.lore: Blood. Carnage. Death. Destruction. This is all Annihilation knows. A fury written into its very core, a violent rage building from an endless War. If it were to have its way, all of Wynn would fall to chaos.
items.name: Bloodbath

majorIds.Sorcery: 25% chance for spells and attacks to cast a second time at no additional cost.

items.lore: You wouldn't even think of committing these atrocities, would you? But what if you weren't the one in control?
items.name: Malevolent Urge

majorIds.Hurricane's Eye: Violent Vortex applies 2 marks to every enemy it hits.

items.lore: Let its whispers guide your hand, and let nothing but a scar of resentment remain.
items.name: Animosity

items.lore: The first of her crimes was against the Church. She blasphemed and raved, cursing with the names of gods long-abandoned.
items.name: Sacrilege

items.lore: Her crimes were against Man. She killed and broke, leaving lifeless bodies piled in her wake, and snuffing lives with horrific indifference.
items.name: Brutality

items.lore: An attempt to rule with an iron fist, a power hellbent on control and force. Unknown. How far does the indomitable spirit of humanity extend?
items.name: Surveillance

items.lore: An attempt to penetrate the depths of the abyss; a sacrifice made to a futile end. No avail. Bloodshed paved the way for bloodshed, and evil still operates while blind.
items.name: Flagellant

majorIds.Perfect Recall: Memory Recollection speeds up Chaos Explosion by 0.1s per spell but increases Chaos Explosion's mana bank requirement by 30.

items.lore: Faces have danced around you as long as you can remember, laughing, jeering, mocking. This is your surrender, casting faces of your own into the theatre of your humiliation.
items.name: Pareidolia

majorIds.Hellfire: Bash is replaced by a single hit, gaining +3 radius and dealing +85%, +10%, and +60%. Boiling Blood's cooldown is set to 2s, gains +40%, +50%, and burns twice as fast for 1s, but can't slow.

items.lore: To forge a weapon such as this from the cursed lava of the portal basin requires dozens, for each smith would lose themselves to the force of corruption before it is finished. The nightmarishly hooked blade serves no purpose but destruction, as intended.
items.name: Apocalypse

items.lore: This ornate bow holds a sinister beauty. Each rediscovery marks impending disaster, against any force that attempts to overcome it. Such is the inevitability of fate: irreverent to the will of masses, an epoch starts anew.
items.name: Epoch

items.lore: An attempt to bring power into the hands of one: wealth weaponized across a province to this end. A hero revolted. Crystals burned and plans were brought to dust.
items.name: Idealogue

majorIds.Efflorescence: Serpent's Garden now centers to where you land with Swan Dive. Damage of Swan Dive, Serpent's Garden and Jasmine Bloom are distributed across all elements.

items.lore: The most dangerous enemy is one you cannot see. Hidden amidst a flurry of petals comes an avalanche of blows, in one moment dissolving mountains and forests into a growing amalgam, leaving a wake of vibrant bloom in the next.
items.name: Hanafubuki

items.lore: An attempt to contain dark within light, to strike back at brutality with compassion. Reality protested. Bring together two forces, and all you have is discord.
items.name: Consolidate

items.lore: An attempt to discover opulence in stone; greed-fueled destruction and avaricious growth. Too far. Chaos was brought into the world, and greed begat death.
items.name: Viridian

items.lore: This sacrificial kris, fallen from the peak of the Tower of Ascension, is completely hollow. To wield it is to invite to yourself the same hollowness. To become such an aberration, to unwrite yourself in pursuit of power...it must be fed of its wielder til only the barest existence remains.
items.name: Oblivion

items.lore: The act of self-immolation is never taken lightly, and is always a sacrifice. This idol was carved to honor one such instance, in which a master of flame burned through his life force in a final act of heroism-purging an encroaching army of the undead, saving the people of the jungle from destruction.
items.name: Immolation

majorIds.Furious Effigy: Totem effects are twice as fast, but duration is halved.

items.lore: They must know what you went through. They must suffer the same as you did.
items.name: Panic Zealot

majorIds.Soul Eater: Devour and Harvester grant double mana. Decreases maximum marks by 1.

items.lore: " ."
items.name: The Nothing

majorIds.Rally: Cleansing Breeze heals you for 15% and allies for 20%, but Charge becomes harmless.

majorIds.Greed: Picking up emeralds heals you and nearby players for 8% max health.

items.lore: "They tear the earth open day after day after day, ripping out her most precious and vital stones, and dumping them into the abyss of their hungry, bottomless coffers. They would sell out the world for a bit of cash; after all, these stones bleed green."
items.name: The Exploited

items.lore: "In the days before they ripped out its heart, there was a pulse to these streets: the sanguine flow of life through the sturdy buildings and cobbled roads and hidden alleys. What remains is a bloodless husk, dusty walls populated solely by those hideous things which can only see and never know."
items.name: The Forsaken

items.lore: Deceptively plain-looking, this relik has been infused with energy from all five known elements. The head gleams in a spectrum of colors.
items.name: Infused Hive Relik

items.lore: Deceptively plain-looking, this dagger has been infused with energy from all five known elements. It leaves afterimages that pulsate in a spectrum of colors.
items.name: Infused Hive Dagger

items.lore: The Fracturing brought Ahms into a shattered sky, sundering cliffs into an archipelago against the void. The tremors that linger carry an ancient power, bringing mountains to heel with ease and leaving devastation in its wake.
items.name: Aftershock

majorIds.Meteor Crash: Burning Sigil gains +6 radius and deals double the damage, but lasts half as long.

majorIds.Strings of Fate: Your puppets have a lifetime of 3 seconds and deal 50% increased damage with attacks and explosions.

items.lore: Aloft among the rafters of the crowded theatre a grin crept from ear to ear. Dim the lights. Tick. Raise the curtains. Tick. This shall be their final act. Tick.
items.name: Marionette

items.lore: Deceptively plain-looking, this spear has been infused with energy from all five known elements. Its tip shimmers in a spectrum of colors.
items.name: Infused Hive Spear

items.lore: "The feeling begins as a prickle on the neck. Is that tree staring? What does it see? How much does it know? This place is not right. It sees too much. It knows too much. The forest is staring at you. It burns the secrets out of you through its awful, unnatural retinas. There is nowhere to hide."
items.name: The Watched

items.lore: Deceptively plain-looking, this wand has been infused with energy from all five known elements. It subtly glows in a spectrum of colors.
items.name: Infused Hive Wand

majorIds.Heat Shimmer: Foul Play will no longer slay a Mirror Clone and will still provide its effects, but Mirror Clone count is reduced to 1. Tricks application is increased by 50%.

items.lore: The soul of a Devil is so hot with hatred that their bodies melt like candle wax, coming off in molten globs of flesh until only black bones remain.
items.name: Syncope

items.lore: Deceptively plain-looking, this bow has been infused with energy from all five known elements. Its string radiates a spectrum of colors.
items.name: Infused Hive Bow

items.lore: "How perfect can a form be? The creatures here are warped. Distorted. their flesh bubbles and oozes with the most toxic of acids. But it makes them powerful. Resilient. Perhaps it would be better to become one of them. Perhaps it would make your form . . . perfect."
items.name: The Evolved

items.lore: Wielding it for too long will leave one a dessicated husk, as this dull blade slowly absorbs all liquids around it.
items.name: Sitis

items.lore: The notorious and erratic magical inventor Gawrick once attempted to make teleportation scrolls obsolete, by creating items which would allow the user to phase into an ethereal state to move unhindered. He did not account for the physical ramifications of this process, however.
items.name: Warp

items.lore: This mysterious, half-liquid trident apparently holds the secret magics to control the ocean's ebb and flow. It is incapable of touching solid ground.
items.name: Tidebinder

items.lore: Perhaps one is weak. To be ignored. Perhaps two are not much better. But what of five? Ten? Twenty?...
items.name: Cluster

items.lore: When really does the point of no return come? Is it a gentle tug, whispers ushering you calmly to the other side? Is it a stark line, the point between light and dark, life and death? Perhaps you'll find out. Perhaps you already know.
items.name: Event Horizon

items.lore: Seems like the name is misspelled a little bit.
items.name: Braker

majorIds.Orbital Chain: Chain Lightning hits slower, rebounds, adds 6 chains, and pulls mobs closer for a 1500% explosion spell.

items.lore: The existence of all things is reflected in the otherworldly jewels of this grand staff, dense enough to have its own gravitational pull. Users have reported their limbs being stretched after usage.
items.name: Singularity

items.lore: If it weren't for that stray mark, this would be spelled correctly...
items.name: Stinger

items.lore: The name has got to be misspelled... It doesn't even make any sense!
items.name: Lower

items.lore: The spelling seems to have been botched.
items.name: Slider

items.lore: Hewn from the great obsidian spires surrounding the massive Nether gate, this fiercely-hooked dagger absorbs light and magic energy alike to create a desolate void wherever it is wielded.
items.name: Black

items.lore: It looks like they spelled the name wrong...
items.name: Bonder

majorIds.Forest's Blessing: Your hound gains 50% more movement speed, attack speed and vision. Arrow Bomb's damage is reduced by -30%.

majorIds.Dead Weight: Totem's horizontal velocity is greatly increased at the cost of vertical movement.

majorIds.Scarce Comfort: Freestream Flow becomes slightly stronger and lasts indefinitely.

items.lore: A hovercraft scrounged from voidstone. Stained glass dulled to bleak grays. Blueprints and notes in indecipherable tongues. Moments, lost in time-like so much refuse from the world above.
items.name: Forlorn Pursuit

majorIds.Divine Honor: Increases the bonus from Radiance by 5%. Bash deals -15% per hit.

items.lore: A great magical cataclysm at Mage Island brought on by a strange, seemingly disconnected series of events resulted in this wand absorbing nearly uncontrollably high levels of magic.
items.name: Cascade

items.lore: Arrows fired by this bow are pure ice, but when they hit the enemy, burst into magical water, flash-freezing all that it touches. The frost burns will never heal.
items.name: Spring

items.lore: This wand merges with the user on touch, bringing about horrific changes to them. Elongated nails, sharp teeth and the ability to breathe fire are trademarks of the beast.
items.name: Monster

items.lore: Mysterious runes, held by inexplicable ancient guardians, were once moulded together for study purposes. The experiment went awry, as the runic words Nii, Az, and Ek were combined in a reaction that resulted in the collapse of a civilization.
items.name: Az

majorIds.Faustian Gambit: Frog Dance triggers once with increased vertical velocity and knockback, and deals +400%.

items.lore: When the two opposing Realms come to blows, War lashes out with blind enmity. Such is the nature of a Devil, each born from the hate those two Beasts bear.
items.name: Mephistophelian

items.lore: Unruly magics of void and darkness are tamed within this bow's string. While those energies are never to be released, arrows fired from it fire at such blinding speeds so as to phase out of existence when they hit their target.
items.name: Divzer

majorIds.Freerunner: When your sprint bar is under 30% full, increase your sprint speed by +150%.

items.lore: Contents under pressure.
items.name: Air In A Can

majorIds.Wormhole: Last Laugh instead casts Meteor. Malicious Mockery causes Meteor to apply 13 Trick stacks.

items.lore: After eons spent in parochial search for something familiar, perhaps this blade should have been a hint to think outside the box.
items.name: The Incomprehensible

items.lore: A deep regret stains this weapon-once a healing implement of the scholar-priest, its gentle power was turned and twisted as his ideals and resolve were tested, and faltered. With its wielder long passed, perhaps it can finally be absolved of the atrocities committed by his hand... and remember the peace it has long forgotten.
items.name: Absolution

items.lore: The Dogun God Garaheth was actually an immense fire demon occupying the bowels of Molten Heights. Although unwise, the Dwarves forged a demonic dagger using his tooth in celebration of his slaughter.
items.name: Inferno

items.lore: The runes carved onto the spear shift appearance so quickly as to be illegible, but those who wield it supposedly will learn their meaning.
items.name: Harwrol

majorIds.Inversion: Teleport will grant you 3 seconds of levitation.

items.lore: No one can hold you down anymore.
items.name: Suspended Soliloquy

majorIds.Fission: Explosions from your Exploding ID are twice as big and twice as strong.

items.lore: Despite the light weight of the weapon, the spearhead has been made from incredibly dense cosmic stone. A strong enough impact can directly destroy matter. Due to this danger, it is sought after to be destroyed.
items.name: Collapse

majorIds.Ergosphere: Storm Dance instead lets your Totems pull enemies within their radius. Totem duration is decreased.

items.lore: It's a gravity as abstract as it is physical, of phenomena so fascinating one can't help but be pulled in.
items.name: Grand Design

majorIds.Earthen Splinter: Quake channels nature energy into a powerful root, travelling underground and emerging under the nearest mob for 1200%.

items.lore: The Dernel tribes revere various nature deities, each in their own unique fashions. One of the most notable was that of a lost tribe, who fashioned this blossoming stave as tribute to their deity of the earth itself.
items.name: Gaia

items.lore: One of the first dwarven theories of the increasing quakes in east Gavel was that the freezing of a Dogun town in the Heights also froze a massive underground spring, disrupting the earth and chain-reacting across the province.
items.name: Cryoseism

items.lore: Despite the existence of the Nether Portal, few believe that it is possible to open such rifts with sheer force alone. None believe that a tool with enough power to accomplish such a monumental feat could exist. And yet...
items.name: Cataclysm

majorIds.Totemic Fuse: Totemic Smash deals +40%, +90%, +90%, and +60% at the cost of half of Totem's duration.

items.lore: One of many lost artifacts from the legendary Wind Fortress, the engraving appears to be a cryptic clue to where the Fortress fell. "We shall be found among the dark winds of the morrow."
items.name: Morrowind

items.lore: The winds are a curious thing. The light breeze is calming, pleasant. The gale buffets and breaks things, as though it were a child's tantrum. Only the storm truly destroys, bearing its gusts against anyone or anything that would stand in its way, leaving behind only ruin and dust.
items.name: Hurricane Recurve

majorIds.Outbreak: When you are within Totem range, the Totem becomes Primed, adding 4% of your Poison ID every 0.25s. Hitting a Primed totem with Uproot will create a 4 block wide poison cloud instantly dealing the stored Poison.

items.lore: Can you feel the burning inside? Something has made itself at home. Time to tuck away the parts of you it has no need for, to shuffle your little brain around so you may Carry. Carry and Spread. Give it a new home-melting you down is how it says thank you. Be grateful, won't you?
items.name: Toxoplasmosis

items.lore: The confusion of sentience creates unknown and marvelous threads and soundscapes. Joy, grief, hate, love, shock, calm, they reflect back into the pattern and song of the universe. The glow of the Weave, and this brilliant, breathtaking, pale imitation of it, too, resounds in the chorus of existence-one extra layer.
items.name: Fantasia

items.lore: The holy blade of the House of Talor was crafted of pure unicorn horns, and consecrated by a hundred priests. Evil spirits are driven away by its mere presence.
items.name: Ivory

items.lore: When the lost city of Sarnfic sunk beneath the depths, nothing but the bubbles of screams and this single wand surfaced. When used, you can still hear the town's lament.
items.name: Lament

items.lore: The raw aspect of thunder, though claimed to be harnessed by a mage in a wand, has only been truly tamed by this mighty blade. Combined electric and life-draining magic intertwine and bring forth the truest, most frightening power of all Thunder.
items.name: Thrundacrack

majorIds.Roving Assassin: Vanish will no longer block mana and health regeneration.

items.lore: A relic of the past in Time Valley was weathered down to a dagger by the sheer power of the wind. When used in battle, mysterious intertwined wind and time magic give it no physical presence.
items.name: Weathered

majorIds.Torment Liturgy: Shadow Siphon now immediately refreshes Vanish when triggered.

items.lore: Found at the site of the Caritat Mansion, a curse falls upon on all who don this glove; a decay of the body, to fester in their wounds, and a decay of the mind, to muddle all thought. With it, a notion takes hold: to suffer together is to suffer no more.
items.name: Grimtrap

majorIds.Pioneer's Echo: Phantom Ray deals two bursts of  150%,  60% over 1 second. Decimator's increase and cap are raised to 140% and Quick Draw's activation threshold is decreased to 2.

items.lore: It is an apathy born from lonely desperation with which one sends a blinding ray as their signal flare, uncaring if it hails friend or foe.
items.name: Song of Solitude

items.lore: I'm not touching this with a... well. Yeah.
items.name: Ten-Foot Pole

items.lore: Those who have used this near-weightless bow all seem to tell tales of how they see Gale's spirit fighting alongside them.
items.name: Gale's Force

items.lore: The very first crossbow in existence was claimed to be utterly indestructible, but it is only true to a fault. The item cannot be broken, but solely because all damage to it is instead reflected onto the user. As its age is uncountably ancient, wielders will find themselves rapidly aging and withering away with even a mere touch.
items.name: Grandmother

items.lore: Forged with flaming scales shorn from Ozoth, the fabled Golden Ninja of the Canyon of the Lost hunted his prey relentlessly using this lightweight, yet harder than steel, polearm.
items.name: Ignition

majorIds.Tidal Drift: Flying Kick will instead send you forwards. This effect is limited to once per Charge cast.

items.lore: Intricate carvings and images, almost like that of a totem pole, cover the shaft of this marvelous trident, dredged up from the Seavale Reef. Foreign magics heighten the senses of its user in battle, but also instills a longing for the ocean. Many have succumbed to this urge and drowned themselves.
items.name: Idol

items.lore: Truth, bliss, emanation, guiding the path forward unto enlightenment.
items.name: Trikaya

majorIds.Punishment: Reflected damage blinds enemies for 1s and makes them 10% more vulnerable to attacks for 3s.

items.lore: The diminutive stature of this item belies its abilities. Absorbing and expelling magical energy in precise bursts, it protects the user from all manner of attacks while punishing those who dare strike.
items.name: Nullification

items.lore: Once known as the Doomsday Weapon, it was ultimately never used for its intended purpose - its solar focus was cracked upon the day of its completion. All but a fraction of its energy was expelled, obliterating its creators, but overwhelming magical force still pulses and thrums through the web of fractures in its design.
items.name: Sunstar

majorIds.Altruism: Nearby players gain 100% of the health you gain from Health Regen and Life Steal.

items.lore: This bow, used by the dwarves to land the final blow in the slaughter of Garaheth, is extremely powerful. Special fire resistant gloves must be worn at all times to prevent burns to the user.
items.name: Ignis

items.lore: The magically rejuvenating properties of phoenix ash were imbued into this grand stave in its creator's bid to gain immortality.
items.name: Phoenix Wing

items.lore: The unwieldy, yet imposing stature of this massive sickle strikes awe into those who view it. Those who have the will to wield it, however, seem to garner respect from all those around them, as though they had become a god.
items.name: Archangel

items.lore: Carved from unknown parts of a sea creature unseen, the goliath scales of this effigy of the deep bring forth...a pull. A weight, a pressure. A terrible, crushing depth brought onto the holder, blanketing them like nostalgia. Their owner watches, part of itself acutely aware of its missing pieces.
items.name: Hadal

majorIds.Space Glide: Lacerate performs a single horizontal jump and slash, dealing 400%.

items.lore: Carelessly aloft, between the heavens and the abyss...
items.name: Dance Among the Stars

items.lore: Soul-locking magic is one outlawed by Gavellian governments, only used by the most insidious and cruel of mages. One such enchantment looms dormant in this mundane-looking maul. Continued usage of the weapon threatens to release it upon the wielder, permanently binding them to the weapon.
items.name: Alkatraz

items.lore: Combined power of inscribed Uth runes and consuming fury combine to create a deadly aura, as this weapon is merely a spiritual extension of the user's desire for utter cataclysm.
items.name: Thrunda Ripsaw

items.lore: Found abandoned in the ruins of the Doguns, these odd weapons are designed to shoot jets of sheer flame instead of hitting enemies traditionally. They are in terrible disrepair, and none know how to fix them.
items.name: Flameshot Hilt

items.lore: Combined power of inscribed Uth runes and immense wisdom meld to create a commanding aura, as this weapon is merely a spiritual extension of the user's desire for dominion over all.
items.name: Nepta Floodbringer

items.lore: Freedom of soul, mind, and body are forced upon all those that this bow's arrows impact, and freedom of caring from the atrocities that such a dangerous weapon can inflict is given to all those that hold it.
items.name: Freedom

items.lore: Combined power of inscribed Uth runes and raw potential fuse to create an imposing presence, as this weapon is merely a spiritual extension of the user's desire for complete obliteration.
items.name: Alka Cometflinger

items.lore: Combined power of inscribed Uth runes and sheer rage intertwine to create a fearsome sight, as this weapon is merely a spiritual extension of the user's desire for total destruction.
items.name: Zephra Shredder

items.lore: This profane bow was crafted by a Kander cabal in opposition to the House of Talor's holy relic. Holding it for too long will strain and warp the user's mind.
items.name: Hellstrand

majorIds.Reality Revision: Phasing Beam instead makes Twain's Arc explode upon hitting an enemy, dealing its damage in a 5 block radius. Twain's Arc now has extreme recoil.

items.lore: Let the land before you serve as the script for your words to write anew.
items.name: Axiom

majorIds.Geocentrism: Aura radiates from you instead of your Totem and can be cast any time.

items.lore: The world revolves around you, after all. It's high time you spread the news!
items.name: Narcissist

items.lore: Stone shorn from mountains by the roiling sea gathered on the shores of Llevigar one day, washed onto the sand in the shape of a massive spear. It was taken as an omen, and the stones were forged into a true weapon.
items.name: Bedruthan

majorIds.Saviour's Sacrifice: While under 50% maximum health, nearby allies gain 15% bonus damage and defence.

items.lore: Enigmatically, this weapon will only show itself to those who believe themselves to be worth nothing, or to be weak. While utilizing this weapon will greatly strengthen one's resolve, it will disappear when it is no longer needed, going to the next wielder.
items.name: Hero

majorIds.Gravity Well: Meteor has increased blast radius and pulls enemies instead.

items.lore: Carved directly from the mysterious rock that hit Gavel 50 years ago, this pure white wand glows with cosmic energy unknown.
items.name: Pure

items.lore: This enigmatic weapon can suddenly blink out of reality with no warning only to appear exactly where it was left later. Artificers have determined that almost the entire bow, by all known laws of nature and magic, should not exist.
items.name: Return to Ether

items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!
items.name: Starburst

items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!
items.name: Sigil of Existence

items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!
items.name: Squall's Breath

items.lore: This bloody palette knife was used to kill only two people before it was abandoned - a killer who broke into a great artist's home, and the artist who struck the blow.
items.name: Alizarin

majorIds.Sublimation: Totemic Shatter heals 75% of Regeneration's usual amount at the cost of 2 blocks of radius.

majorIds.Fallout: Bomb Arrow gains +7.5 range, +50%, severely increased recoil, and 25% self-damage.

items.lore: The calm before the storm is a time of preparation, of perseverance until clearer days. But this? This is the last moment of peace they will ever know.
items.name: Herald of Ruin

items.lore: Holding this relik sends sparks through your veins, making your heart beat fast. And faster. And faster and faster and--
items.name: Overdrive

items.lore: The wear upon this broken old battle spear does not affect its ability in battle. The souls of a thousand fallen warriors resound within it.
items.name: Tisaun's Proof

items.lore: The unstable power within this bow is capable of great destruction, but seems to zero out at the most crucial moments in battle. Only the most skillful archers can wield this weapon with confidence.
items.name: Zero

majorIds.Cherry Bombs: Turns Smoke Bomb into firecrackers that fly farther, tighter, and deal 100%, 30%, 30%, and 30% instantly.

items.lore: And as the spring bursts, the blossom petals flutter in the wind amongst the ashes of your enemies.
items.name: Blossom Haze

items.lore: From the Nether Gate, a shard of cosmic stone was ejected. Its purity was defiled, and the first man to wield it went mad, raving about the fall of the cosmos' beauty.
items.name: Lunar Spine

majorIds.Seeking Module: Homing Shots track towards nearby enemies much more aggressively.

items.lore: To look and say "I will go there," and to keep going until you find it...that's what's important.
items.name: Wanderer's Purpose

items.lore: Built by Cerid to accrue raw static charge from the surroundings and direct it at opponents, the blade's chief failing is that the wielder is not rendered immune to their own discharge as intended.
items.name: Brass Brand

majorIds.Troll Barge: Quake allows you to charge forth, dealing 80% and 20% to any mobs hit, and ending with a powerful stomp for 400% and 150%. This will leave you vulnerable.

items.lore: There's a scrawling etched onto the handle: "UNGA BUNGA'S. NO TOUCH."
items.name: Shredder Club

items.lore: Once a contract is formed, and before its details are discussed, a seal is placed on the human's body.
items.name: Faustian Contract

items.lore: This spear is bright enough that it can cause blindness if you look directly at it. Its immense power is limited by its weight; the weapon is nearly impossible to lift.
items.name: Proxima

majorIds.Paragon: Shield Strike deals 600% damage. Mantle of the Bovemist's cooldown is reduced by 15s, but is limited to one shield charge.

items.lore: The tides of the ocean, once bound, became useful magic power sources. They were once utilized for weapons, but to harness the unstable force of the raging sea was considered too dangerous.
items.name: Torrential Tide

majorIds.Peaceful Effigy: Your Totem will last twice as long.

items.lore: ...I'll finish writing this later.
items.name: Procrastination

majorIds.Entropy: Meteor's speed is increased by 50%.

items.lore: What chaos is born when the sun won't rise, as it lacks a sky upon which to dawn?
items.name: Shattered Horizon

majorIds.Lustrate: Heal restores health at a slower rate, but Searing Light deals +150%.

items.lore: Named for an ancient Wynnic word for "Earthquake", this mighty battle hammer causes the very bones of struck enemies to rattle and heave as though the earth itself was splitting under their feet.
items.name: Rikter

items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!
items.name: Aersectra

majorIds.Windsurf: Righting Reflex has 75% reduced fall speed, lasts twice as long, and is affected stronger by movement speed.

items.lore: An extremely rare metallic ore only found within the island region of Corkus, it is normally used in decorative dyes. However, a mishap one day caused the discovery of strange and cumulative effects when exposed to traditional magicks.
items.name: Bismuthinite

items.lore: Recovered from the Lexdale Penitentiary, this grisly bow holds destructive capabilities. Used to carry out executions, a precise enough shot can shatter the soul of those it hits.
items.name: Spiritshock

majorIds.Sorcery: 25% chance for spells and attacks to cast a second time at no additional cost.

items.lore: Time moves in strange ways around this translucent blade, speeding and slowing, starting and stopping, with no observable reasoning or pattern.
items.name: Rewind

majorIds.Last Resort: Bloodlust has doubled corrupted scaling and knockback, but deals -100% -60%.

items.lore: Well...it is a very pretty-looking stick, but aside from that it just appears to be a plain old stick.
items.name: Gert Super Special Magic Ultistick

majorIds.Evershot: Arrow Hurricane becomes a consistent, straight stream of arrows with a slower fire rate, dealing greater knockback and triple damage per arrow. Additionally, Arsenal Synergy requires 10 less arrows for each flint arrow.

items.lore: Warning - device in state of extreme disrepair. Operators may experience unstable output, resulting in severe heat production upsurges. Any damage to material will not be reimbursed, and users will not be compensated for any injuries, burns, or deaths caused by improper use.
items.name: Welder Cannon

items.lore: This golden staff was recovered from deep within the tombs of Almuj. Nothing else was found in the room except the words 'Beware the user with unlimited imagination.'
items.name: Empire Builder

items.lore: The creator of this polished white blade insists that its true power will never be unlocked, for only those who are not influenced by the elements of the world know truly how to utilize it.
items.name: Blade of Purity

items.lore: They have pillaged your faithful houses and razed your sacred fields. Imbued within this lance is an aspect of holy power, and with it you will bring Hell itself up to meet these vile transgressors.
items.name: Inquisitor's Zeal

majorIds.Furious Effigy: Totem effects are twice as fast, but duration is halved.

items.lore: You will probably irreversibly harm yourself with this, but when has that ever stopped you?
items.name: Tachypsychia

items.lore: Reconstructed from mere wooden scraps of its former self, this extremely heavy crossbow still contains immense power. It was intended for use with a lost suit of armor, of which only one piece remains.
items.name: Heracul

items.lore: It takes two voices to make harmony.
items.name: Twin Minds

items.lore: A blade of pure light forms in your hands. It moves of its own accord, a blinding radiance dancing through your enemies, using you as a vessel for its brilliance.
items.name: Bright Edge

items.lore: This staff was expertly crafted from fragile spun glass, and tinted with various magical foci that bend light into its most raw components.
items.name: Prymari

items.lore: Stories say that should anyone wield both of these fearsome gauntlets in battle, they will become unkillable in a fight. The second gauntlet, however, has never been found.
items.name: Arma Gauntlet

majorIds.Lockdown: Meteor will snap onto a target in range, regardless of aim.

items.lore: "I've been wishin' I was dead for a long time."
items.name: Warden

items.lore: The strength to keep going, to push on in the face of adversity. It's a rare kind of grit, the one that takes hold and won't let go until the task is done.
items.name: Tenacity

items.lore: This wand is capable of attacks so fast that it appears to flicker in and out of existence. Anyone able to access its full potential will be seen as only a blur to their enemies.
items.name: Afterimage

items.lore: Crafted exclusively by the Temple of the Legends' mages, this stave is honorary to Mages who best the Temple's Grand Magus.
items.name: Stave of the Legends

items.lore: This peculiar weapon was once wielded by the firey warrior Igbar, who used it to great effect in endurance competitions.
items.name: Toaster

items.lore: Supposedly based off of the wand of master mage Ethe, this wand is plated with magic-focusing jewels and heavy gold, yet somehow remains entirely weightless.
items.name: Ethereal

items.lore: A psychopath claiming herself to be Death incarnate used this dark-bladed scythe on a killing spree that lasted over a year. It reaped hundreds of lives, including her own.
items.name: Scythe

items.lore: The fabled weapon of the titular dark Assassin, the blade's small stature hides its true powers. Shadows undulate about the hilt.
items.name: Blade of Shade

items.lore: One of Skien's many deadly weapons. This warhammer, despite the massive weight of the hammerhead, was able to be swung by Skien fast enough to be a blur.
items.name: Helm Splitter

items.lore: Lost by master sailor Carvel in a massive storm, it was carried all the way out to the city of Selchar, where it was found spewing seafoam and lightning bolts.
items.name: Maelstrom

items.lore: Despite appearing as a basic blade when held, strange spiritual magic changes its form into a sharp, ring-like cutting edge when used to attack. Only one person was known to master the weapon's abilities.
items.name: Chakram

majorIds.Frenetic Spirit: Guardian Angels damage is set to 10%, but shoot 40% faster and last 5 times longer. Frenzy's cap is increased by 55.

items.lore: Your saviour is not coming.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Blighted Seraph

majorIds.Fission: Explosions from your Exploding ID are twice as big and twice as strong.

items.lore: Watch as they receive your gift of imminent disaster and endless fallout.
items.name: Hesperium

items.lore: Among the outcasts of Efilim, some preach that death is not to be feared. They say while the road to his door is hellish, and his messenger most cruel, the beyond forgives. In this gilded spear, you see not only a weapon, but a key, a ticket. You know what to do. Be the messenger.
items.name: Heaven's Gate

majorIds.Geocentrism: Aura radiates from you instead of your Totem and can be cast any time.

items.lore: From coals to conflagration, the flames of War flicker forever.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Infernus Aeterna

items.lore: This indestructible dagger was found floating in the magma of the Molten Heights, with a lament from its exiled smith carved onto the hilt.
items.name: The Exile

items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!
items.name: The Eviscerator

items.lore: "If anyone finds this, leave it at my Gale's gravesite. I promised her a memento, too." This inscription is extremely weathered.
items.name: Ohms' Wish

majorIds.Juggle: Mutilate adds an additional 12 hits. All hits are reduced by -10%.

items.lore: Not knowing what's going on is the best part!
items.name: Roiling Ruckus

items.lore: Despite this mace never seeing use by Remikas, it was seen as a symbol of the might of his rule over Gavel. Its true abilities in battle have never been seen.
items.name: Remikas' Righteousness

items.lore: The powerful psychic energies surrounding this bow are rumored to increase accuracy, though this has not been refuted by any reliable source.
items.name: Clairvoyance

majorIds.Displace: Etheric Slash deals massive knockback to enemies hit by Teleport.

items.lore: Behind you are the corpses of the weak, of those who deserved to die. Before you are those willing to join them.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Carnage Agglomerate

majorIds.Plague: Poisoned mobs spread their poison to nearby mobs.

items.lore: Carried by the Olux Plague Doctor, this simple-looking stick subtly oozes with an unidentifiable substance that is invigorating to the holder, and lethally venomous to anything else.
items.name: Plague Staff

items.lore: Wielded by the chief of the Tromsian jungle's zombie tribes, the augmentable crystals within it focus natural elemental energies to intense levels.
items.name: Kahontsi Ohstyen

majorIds.Tackle: Flying Kick deals much more knockback and increases Collide damage by an additional 150%, 60%, and 10%.

items.lore: Don't give them time for even a warning.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Terminal Velocity

majorIds.Flurry of Blows: Turn Double Slice into a 10-hit pummeling of 16% damage per hit.

items.lore: Everything dies. Show those who resist the foolishness of their ambitions.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Omnia Mors

items.lore: This bow's thick string fails to shoot arrows effectively, but instead produces low frequency sound waves that erupt from the source in all directions. The sound can implode the eardrums of an enemy with a single strum.
items.name: Soundwave

items.lore: One of the most unstable wands known to man. Using the bark of the Flerisi trunk, it reaps fiery destruction upon its enemies.
items.name: Diablo

majorIds.Perilous Flare: Pyrokinesis moves much slower, but has an increased Area of Effect and  +50%.

items.lore: Everything slowly loses heat, and will eventually stop moving. Are you prepared?
items.name: Heat Death

items.lore: Skien's trust in others was shattered permanently by the wielder of this dagger, who fell to the corruption and attacked his legion during a great corrupted siege.
items.name: Locrian

items.lore: Only the most honourable warriors of Gavel's army are presented the fearsome, fiery spear forged from the rarest metals of the Molten Heights.
items.name: Fierte

majorIds.Methodical: Initiator's reset time is reduced by 75%. Arrow Bomb area damage is halved, but direct hit damage is doubled.

items.lore: Outrun. Outsmart. Outlast.
items.name: Attrition

items.lore: This expertly crafted relik was notched by a cryptid-researching fanatic. Its feathers and baubles chime with a soothing melody.
items.name: Olux's Prized Relik

items.lore: Many who venture into the jungle are swallowed by the thick undergrowth and are never seen again. This weapon and an accompanying skeleton were found inside the very adversary the spear was meant to vanquish as a perfect display of its owner's untimely demise.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Sludge Slicer

items.lore: This expertly crafted dagger was smithed by a cryptid-researching fanatic. It can chop through even the thickest of the swamp's clay with ease.
items.name: Olux's Prized Dagger

majorIds.Evershot: Arrow Hurricane becomes a consistent, straight stream of arrows with a slower fire rate, dealing greater knockback and triple damage per arrow. Additionally, Arsenal Synergy requires 10 less arrows for each flint arrow.

items.lore: If you reach for ammunition from your quiver, as long as you have a single arrow, you will find you never run out.
items.name: Infinity

items.lore: This expertly crafted wand was shaped by a cryptid-researching fanatic. It shimmers with the purest water from the swamp.
items.name: Olux's Prized Wand

items.lore: This expertly crafted spear was forged by a cryptid-researching fanatic. It shines brilliantly in even the weakest sunlight.
items.name: Olux's Prized Spear

items.lore: This expertly crafted bow was whittled by a cryptid-researching fanatic. Its frame was cut from the very toughest tree roots.
items.name: Olux's Prized Bow

majorIds.Hurricane's Eye: Violent Vortex applies 2 marks to every enemy it hits.

items.lore: Crafted from Mandragora roots and adorned with decorative wreaths of Elven pines, these wands are utilized in Efilim's solstice festivals to celebrate each passing year of Villager and Elven comradery.
items.name: Bough of Fir

items.lore: Legends whisper of an incredible blade, that ripples the ground and shatters the tide. Formed from the waves of the sea, it's said all who wield it are untouchable. This, however... appears to just be a regular old pen?
items.name: Anaklusmos

items.lore: Prolonged exposure to the corruption may cause sudden bursts of madness in soldiers. To assure themselves of their sanity, some have even begun to play tricks on their brethren.
items.name: Impulse

items.lore: The radiance of your foes burns bright. You must emanate your brilliance in return. Cloak them in a blinding glow. Smother their luminance with yours. Then after all of their light has faded, yours will too.
items.name: Shine Suffocator

items.lore: Ooze secretes out of every inch of this quarterstaff. Is it simply just more of the slime harassing travelers in the jungle, or is there something sinister at play?It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Scumlord

majorIds.Rally: Cleansing Breeze heals you for 15% and allies for 20%, but Charge becomes harmless.

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Bloodbag

items.lore: For the hundreds sacrificed for Troms's survival, death was not the end. Residual dark magic and corrupted energy manifests in this weapon as faint echoes of sorrow and agony from the slain who were denied peace.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Hecatomb

items.lore: A grave digger uncovered this blade from the resting place of a notorious pirate that pillaged the islands of the ocean for four decades.
items.name: Reaper of Soul

majorIds.Gruesome Knots: Bleeding and Twisted Tether deal double damage, but Bleeding duration is reduced.

items.lore: Decay spreads unseen, but you know it spreads, and that is enough.
items.name: Decaybound Spindle

majorIds.Lustrate: Heal restores health at a slower rate, but Searing Light deals +150%.

items.lore: The light refracted through this sceptre shows you visions. You see the endless waves reflected in its rainbows, cracking hulls and drowning towns. This prism allows you to channel a fraction of the sea's potential.
items.name: Sealight Prism

items.lore: No one expected the WynnExcavation volcanic site to produce any valuable materials, but this heavy, obsidian-blend bow silenced the critics.
items.name: Eruption

items.lore: After this crossbow's original wielder fell in battle, its mechanisms stiffened and locked into place. A spark of life, or undeath, can temporarily reverse the effect before the weapon seizes up again.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Rigor Mortis

majorIds.Temblor: Bash gains +1 Area of Effect and is 0.05s faster.

items.lore: Dwarven folklore tells of this mighty maul, used by gods to break mountains, shape continents, and crack the earth to form caverns.
items.name: Fissure

items.lore: Discipline and experience is channeled into these wands for 10 years in the Bantisu monastery of the canyon, in the hope that they will pass on its teachings to less experienced users.
items.name: Sage

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Arterial Spray

items.lore: No eyes see past the dark fog that enshrouds the future. But if you could perhaps light the way, what would you see? Invigorating hope? Or a warning to be heeded?
items.name: Temporal Lantern

majorIds.Fan the Hammer: Arrow Storm becomes a single stream of 6 high-powered arrows that deal 90% and 35%.

items.lore: The weapon of the fearsome lone bandit, Rymek Luke, it is unique in that it is designed to fire small metal rounds instead of more traditional projectiles.
items.name: Deadeye

items.lore: The density of this weapon is almost immeasurable. Despite being light and easy to wield, the spear seems to have its own gravitational pull, slowly dragging enemies closer and making it nearly impossible to put down.
items.name: Pulsar

items.lore: This dagger has no blade. Instead, it is layered with the stingers of the Black Shadow Scorpion, which has the ability to vanish entirely from its prey.
items.name: Scorpion

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Dissever

items.lore: This bow has no string. Instead, a thin lightning-like thread is strung upon it. It is said to be limited only by the speed of the user.
items.name: Thunderbolt

items.lore: The blazing sun has been revered by many druidic sects as a god in its own right, and the jewel in this brilliant wand glows with the brightness of their holy star.
items.name: Glare

items.lore: Forged from the fang of a ferocious beast. Despite its small size, it can land blows at considerable range.
items.name: Bluetooth

items.lore: The weapon nearly catches fire during the merchant's demonstration. He still refuses to discount it despite this.
items.name: Upgraded Flare Blitz

items.lore: "The plants loathe to take hold upon the red stone. And so, we must hunt instead." -Caras, Owl Tribesman
items.name: Sprout

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Spinal Estoc

items.lore: "You don't really advance much when it comes to ovens. For clay, glass, ceramics...it was perfected a long time ago." -Treous, Almuj Glassblower
items.name: Dune Kiln

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Treachery

items.lore: "When payback is the rule of the land, it feels safest to do nothing." -Ormrod, Self-exiled Almuj Resident
items.name: Karma

items.lore: "It never rains here, but we hear the thunder echoing in the distance." -Lanu, Almuj Archaeomancer
items.name: Clunderthap

items.lore: "My husband's such a scaredy-cat. What good is tomb raiding if you're not in the tomb?" -Dr. Junes, Almuj Archaeologist
items.name: Chaser

items.lore: "Betrayal stings sharper than a scorpion's tail, and festers worse than the poison inside." -Attributed to Hashr
items.name: Hashr Claw

items.lore: Every time this spear hits an enemy, a sharp electrical jolt hits the users hands that forces powerful lightning to release.
items.name: Fierce Thunder

items.lore: Apparently, they thought to make a long bow better, they should make it longer. You can barely hold it.
items.name: Upgraded Long Bow

items.lore: "Bandit attacks losing you sleep? Free fighting classes here! Only 10 emeralds- they won't know what hit 'em!" -Almuj Self-Defense Class Advertisement
items.name: Jaw Breaker

items.lore: The blade seems sharper than normal, but it also seems rather brittle. The smithing was obviously a hack-job...
items.name: Upgraded Whisper

items.lore: This knife does not belong in your hands... yet somehow it feels right at home.
items.name: Influence

items.lore: "I have to wonder just how healthy slime found in the depths of a desert cavern can be to drink." -Eluzterp, Almuj resident
items.name: Miasma

items.lore: The blade is covered in tape that's been scribbled on in order to make it look fiery. This doesn't seem like a wise purchase.
items.name: Upgraded HellRaiser

items.lore: "The sun and related symbols appear quite often in these ancient glyphs. Interesting, but unsurprising, no?" -Svin, Legend Keeper
items.name: Sol

items.lore: It seems stronger at first glance, but upon closer inspection the blade is rather...soft?
items.name: Upgraded Archpriest

items.lore: "100% curse-free or your money back!" The merchant explained that this policy is not legally binding after you read it.
items.name: Upgraded Cursed Bow

items.lore: "It feels like all these "ancient" civilizations have better tech than we do nowadays." -Knox, Corkus Immigrant and Sandstorm Vandals bandit
items.name: Tremolo

items.lore: According to the merchant, the wand is extra flammable, so that it can burn up and disappear with all the mages quicker.
items.name: Upgraded Phoenix

items.lore: The two mesa tribes once were allies until their sacred totems were stolen. Before that time, however, they often shared their talents, and this bow hewn from mesa stone was one such lost craft.
items.name: Mesarock Arch

items.lore: The mystery of the ocean's appearance has eluded scholars for centuries. It is believed that many years ago, warlocks used wands like this one in an attempt to submerge the world.
items.name: Waves Raiser

items.lore: Did the merchant really think that adding severed bat wings to the weapon would make it more authentic?
items.name: Upgraded Echolocation

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Fractured Lyre

items.lore: It is significantly heavier than usual...you can't tell if that is good or not, in this case.
items.name: Upgraded Steel Buster

items.lore: The inscribed lyrics have been scratched out and replaced with a barely-legible insult.
items.name: Upgraded Lullaby

items.lore: The craftsmanship on this bow is rather poor. The paint on the "crystals" is chipping...
items.name: Upgraded Radiance

items.lore: Little spikes of corruption grow out of the blades on this weapon, serrating it. They seem to grow after drawing blood, guiding your body to dig further into the enemy's viscera even after they've already died.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Goredrinker

items.lore: The guard on the spear is smaller, but at least twice as thick. What purpose does that have?
items.name: Upgraded Vartija

items.lore: The blade actually looks to be of good quality, unlike the other products. The only problem is the questionable stain covering most of it.
items.name: Upgraded Scalpel

items.lore: A mystical sapling native to the shores of Mage Island has been fashioned into this simple staff. Even uprooted, you notice its continuous growth.
items.name: Blossom

items.lore: This blackiron blade was left to sear in the desert for months on end by a fanatical berserker. It burned him alive as he cut down those who opposed him.
items.name: Chaleur

majorIds.Fallout: Bomb Arrow gains +7.5 range, +50%, severely increased recoil, and 25% self-damage.

items.lore: Innards, outwards.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Viscera Burst
