items.lore: The art of endurance fighting is a skill lost to time. However, a thief that to this day has not been caught, imbued this dagger with the very same ability.
items.name: Stabsand

items.lore: Even reduced to just the bones, you can't help but feel bad for the poor thing this paw came from.
items.name: Wybel Paw

items.lore: There are parts from at least six separately recognizable weapons mashed together to make this. There's no way it's effective.
items.name: Upgraded Melange

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Bugbite

items.lore: One who forsook all others in pursuit of their own gain forced an extension of their own will into existence. This culmination of that will consumes all it touches.
items.name: Blazing Ruin

items.lore: The flickering flame atop this simple wand is a marvel of magic. It always burns at a comfortable heat, cannot scorch skin even if touched, and never can be snuffed out under any circumstance.
items.name: Red Candle

items.lore: The weathered oar of Haros, the outcast ferryman of Charon's Forsaken Legion. Magical implements have been jury-rigged onto the silver pole, glowing dull out of his bony grasp.
items.name: Haros' Oar

items.lore: A year-long monsoon soaked this Nemract-made bow so much, that it has harnessed the very essence of water.
items.name: Nemract's Rage

items.lore: Quick, over there!
items.name: Overreach

items.lore: "We'll ensure that under our watch, all your families will be reunited!" -Haros, of the Banished Legion
items.name: Death's Reach

items.lore: "Those bloody zombies don't kip down at night, what makes you think a curfew might bally-well help?" -General Graken, Nemract Militia
items.name: Abolition

items.lore: Sometimes, wavers in the light reveal visions of fantastical places. A window or portal rippled into existence for just a moment, then winked out by a breeze.
items.name: Uncanny Mirage

items.lore: "The dead can still hear. I figure a lullaby might help convince them to sleep a bit longer." -Merloni, Saint's Row Priest
items.name: Hymn of the Dead

items.lore: The magic in this wand seems much weaker than normal...and there's a rather rude message written on the handle.
items.name: Upgraded Dark Needle

items.lore: "And no one's going to save us from the beasts about to strike. We've seen horrors stare us in the eyes, and we're fighting for our lives." -Poe, Nemract Sewer Dweller
items.name: Thriller

items.lore: "I got a name, known far and wide! Run along, you bandit scum, before you have to learn it the hard way!" -Sayleros' Brother, killed by bandits
items.name: Damnation

items.lore: "Can anyone else understand that General Graken? Because I can't." -Commander Takan, Nemract Militia
items.name: Sanies

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Fiend

items.lore: Used for endurance training on the Icy Islands, this bow forces the wielder's body temperature to drop to near-hypothermic levels.
items.name: Glacial Crest

items.lore: "The gravestone for the brother of that man, Sayleros? For whatever reason, it didn't have a proper name on it." -Sacre, Saint's Row Priest
items.name: Cathedral

items.lore: "Never wish to see a dead loved one again. In this day and age, they'll come back to see you." -Mylo, Nemract Conscript
items.name: Styx's Grab

items.lore: Many have tried to duplicate the properties of this spear, but very few have succeeded in enchanting a spearhead with explosive magic that does not cause the spear itself to explode.
items.name: Legendary Smasher

items.lore: Once having held unstoppable amounts of magic, being forced to fuse into one form locked away all but the smallest sliver of their power.
items.name: The Divide

items.lore: "Leave us down here to die, why don't you all. Just turn us into another statistic and be done, huh?" -Ragamal, Nemract Sewer Dweller
items.name: Putrid

items.lore: One of Detlas' buildings was struck by lightning 60 years ago and burnt to the ground, apart from one wooden beam that began to glow. It was fashioned into an exclusive wand for resident mages.
items.name: Detlas' Legacy

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Intestine Lasso

items.lore: The ocean's bounty is full of many strange things. Sailor's tales of a peculiar fish with a snout like a sword and the unbelievable stories of its power thus inspired fanciful ideas in blacksmiths. The results speak for themselves.
items.name: The Swordfish

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Backbiter

items.lore: They say the first sip of the ocean's wrath fizzes like champagne. The second burns with a sharp saltiness. By the third, the bubbles rise from your own drowning lungs as the sea claims its aperitif.
items.name: Effervescence

items.lore: The ember manifests kindness. The blaze manifests cruelty. Both share an origin within the sun's flame. But what separates warmth from ruin is not the fire, but the hand that calls upon it. Mercy and wrath are merely reflections cast by the same unblinking star.
items.name: Cruel Sun

items.lore: "If you squish a spider egg, sometimes little spiders pop out. So, squish the whole area instead!" -Captain Fenor, Detlas Legion
items.name: Maul

items.lore: "I always thought Yahya was venom-addled, but the symptoms don't match..." -Pyeka, Alekin Herbalist
items.name: Pyrexia

items.lore: "Controlled burns are healthy, but it's clear why no one wants to do them." -Darek, Alekin Trailblazer
items.name: Match

items.lore: The reigning king of thieves in Almuj's underworld would brandish this golden dagger to his enemies so fast, you wouldn't even realise your wallet was now missing.
items.name: Almuj's Daggers

items.lore: "And you thought walking into a cobweb was bad." -Ope, Ragni Botanist
items.name: Web Spitter

items.lore: "Cut a web, and its owner will feel it and come out. That's your chance to strike." -Lieutenant Van, Detlas 2nd Regiment
items.name: Silk Slasher

items.lore: "I am not making this up! That spider teleported ONTO MY FACE!" -Stiba, Elemental Researcher
items.name: Iklaj

items.lore: Forged from unbreakable obsidian eras ago, this heavy hammer has crushed many foes with a single swing.
items.name: The Berserk

items.lore: "The vines you'll find among the foliage make for great rope!" -Alekin's Guide to Plant Fiber Cordage
items.name: Ivy Whip

items.lore: "Not every spider is venomous, but do you really want to get bitten by them all to figure out which are?" -Alvin, Nivla Forest Resident
items.name: Fangs

items.lore: "I saw that spider queen once. It felt like it was only a matter of time before she found my home, so I moved here." -Babhla, Nivla Bowl Merchant
items.name: Hourglass

items.lore: Many old mages had to perform lengthy incantations to make potent even their simplest spells. A mage cursed to be mute, however, brought upon a revolution to spellcasting through this simple wand.
items.name: Reticence

items.lore: The average bow can boast a range of skills, but unlike this one, not every bow can penetrate through any organic skin, including dragon hide.
items.name: Skin Piercer

items.lore: "I swear on my life those spiders were covered in spikes! Go out there, see if I'm wrong!" -Suri, Elemental Researcher
items.name: Sting

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Boil Lance

items.lore: These bulky-looking gauntlets are actually extremely lightweight, being created of a magical elf-blessed iron alloy blend.
items.name: Iron Knuckle

items.lore: The stalwart Guard Golems stand as the protectors of Wynn's cities. To wield the remains of one so viciously dismembered by the undead... just how deadly are these hordes?It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Golem's Arm

items.lore: Despite being proven unrelated, this enigmatic bow was the lynchpin to beginning the great search for the Relics.
items.name: Relic

items.lore: A wand forged from the dust of life itself. It destroys and protects in equal parts.
items.name: Carbon

items.lore: The wear on this humble war pick's blade has only made it more effective in combat, allowing its users to make unexpected parries of opponents' attacks by hooking and hitting through the weapon.
items.name: Clash Hook

items.lore: A spear hewn from a radioactive metal. It may be toxic for the wielder, but it is fatal to its enemies.
items.name: Radium

items.lore: An effigy built from the stones of the mantle. It crushes anything in its wake.
items.name: Silicon

items.lore: Wielded by the master of the Decrepit Sewers Dungeon, the arrows of this bow causes the target's body to slowly wither away.
items.name: Witherhead's Elbow

items.lore: "I bet those sewer-dwellers have horrible morning breath." -Folzoy, Maltic Escort
items.name: Serpent's Kiss

items.lore: It is thought that this primitive wand was used by early man to create the first spells. It is made from a wood that no longer exists.
items.name: Ancient Wand

items.lore: A bow drawn from the air itself. It imbues the wielder with all the spirit of the wind.
items.name: Nitrogen

items.lore: This heavy crossbow forces a strange compulsion in its users when wielded. They will often refuse to even shoot unless entirely certain of a hit.
items.name: Crackshot

items.lore: "Even a corrupted would get crushed by one of these!" -Roche 'Stone-thrower' Diamant, Ragni Citizen
items.name: Skull Breaker

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Cauterizer

items.lore: A blade crafted from the ocean's elements. It slices through enemies with the grace of the tides.
items.name: Hydrogen

items.lore: Often, the leader of brute gangs would use this dagger to threaten his followers into making sure they did not fail him.
items.name: Dislocater

items.lore: "The first time I saw one of those zombies I nearly had a heart attack! The blighters are terrifying." -Rynend, Maltic Citizen
items.name: Defibrillator

items.lore: "There's never new water flowing into those sewers. It all cycles back into itself...not natural." -Jenprest, Ragni Legion 2nd Division
items.name: Stale

items.lore: "Only the most wicked in Gavel could dream of a circumstance as what plagues this Wynn province." -King of Ragni
items.name: Macabre

items.lore: This bow, which grants its wielder the gift of increased sight, was forged by a blind blacksmith determined to protect others from his sightless fate.
items.name: Keen Eye

items.lore: "Catch a fresh-raised corrupted, it's like catching a soldier without his morning coffee. Stumbly and unfocused." -Enzan, Retired Ragni Soldier
items.name: Corpse

items.lore: "As much as they're terrifying, at least those lousy skeletons give us lots of bonemeal for the crops!" -Bylvis, Katoa Ranch Farmer
items.name: Sketiq

items.lore: This short spear was the first weapon to be produced by the villagers for sale. They are old, but strong.
items.name: Maltic's Old Spear

items.lore: Corkian technology was not the first to create an item that is capable of recording noise. Artifacts from Time Valley were found to record ambient sounds and distort them into ear-splitting sonic bursts.
items.name: Harsh Noise

items.lore: Carrying this hefty staff, you feel a sense of security and emboldenment. Its protective powers ensure you stay far out of the grasping undeads' reach.
items.name: Barrier Staff

items.lore: Many said making a bow out of iron would be slow and wasteful, but the weight of the iron arrow can pierce even stone.
items.name: Iron String

items.lore: An age of transformation. To shape the evolution of life, as if molding a piece of clay. To gain intelligence, and become the harbingers of creation and destruction. To build control, and become the hand of fate. Here, we begin.
items.name: Phanerozoic

items.lore: Look around and observe! An overcast sky; yet the blue of day seeps through the gloom, illuminating the land around you. A patch of weeds; yet flowers bloom vividly in spite of the wretched foliage surrounding them. The struggles of nature create your own personal utopia. A world, tailormade, just for you. Only you.
items.name: Alstroemania

items.lore: Shards of frost and bone, fragments of memories and worlds; it all shatters under your step. The cracks reach deep. Too deep. Your soul rests on thin ice.
items.name: Embrittlement

majorIds.Burnt Shadows: Buried Light is faster and is controlled by the direction you face. Enemies in the light instead take 80% and recieve 10% more damage.

items.lore: What once crowned the Commander of Aelumia's Gendarmerie, now reduced to a singed fragment of its former self.
items.name: Heretic

items.lore: Forged in a hidden workshop, these boots were imbued with earthen quartz and bound lightning. Their wearer crackles with static energy, amplifying every strike. Many have chased this power, only to find themselves uprooted by its shocking embrace.
items.name: Static Cling

items.lore: A symbol of authority, power, and the right to rule. Let Her leadership burn brightly forevermore, leading us into a new era of strength.
items.name: Crown of Jewels

majorIds.Last Resort: Bloodlust has doubled corrupted scaling and knockback, but deals -100% -60%.

items.lore: Soldiers training in extreme cold conditions often push themselves beyond the limits. This however is not sustainable, as their bodies frantically scramble for survival.
items.name: Catabolysis

items.lore: Some places must be protected at all costs. In a frigid, worldwide desert of apathy and ruination, there somehow still remain some oases of love and warmth. Keep them safe, as long as you can.
items.name: Firewall

majorIds.Superconductor: Chain Lightning channels three massive lightning bolts through you, arcing to enemies within 8 blocks for 225% and stunning them for 1s. You take 10% more damage for 4s.

items.lore: There is nothing in these walls that will remain hidden forever. Nothing unaccounted for by the gleaming light of The Citadel.
items.name: Panopticon

items.lore: An oasis of flame, where noone can hurt you. Through abhorrence and loathing, you may create a world where all things burn, and a perfectly beautiful world it will be indeed.
items.name: Sea of Fire

items.lore: Where thought converges, the veil thins.
items.name: Nexus

items.lore: The grave leaves its mark on any who have been there. Few make it out; fewer still can bring their minds, too, back to life.
items.name: Sepulchral Shackles

items.lore: Ancient scholars claim the malevolent fungus within its plates feeds on the host's life force, granting unspeakable toxic power in return. Yet every wearer risks wasting away from the inside out.
items.name: Carcinogen

items.lore: Sleek black plates, harder than steel, tougher than granite. Threads of ancient magick weave themselves through the material, granting you all the power of the dark stone.
items.name: Greaves of Purest Obsidian

majorIds.Intangible: The knockback you take is drastically reduced, and reflected damage deals large knockback.

items.lore: Your mind is ripped away from reality, puppeting the ghost of a vessel that once held your brilliant spirit. But here, now, you can do things you never before thought possible. They cannot touch you here, here in the realm where the shadows live.
items.name: Soul Unmade

majorIds.Seeking Module: Homing Shots track towards nearby enemies much more aggressively.

items.lore: Exploitation is a game as old as time, but rarely one to be played so transparently. When war reaches your doorstep, though, the facade of civility falls-there is no shame in bleeding an enemy dry.
items.name: Inhumanity

items.lore: Barrages of rain and ice can bite and break; symphonies thunder and wind can deafen and crash. The worst storms, though, the kind that leave no survivors; those creep up quietly, steal in through the moonlit fields, and whisk the world away without a trace.
items.name: Serene Storm

majorIds.Orbwalk: Lightweaver Orbs gain +1 area of effect, 20%, and 20%, but move slower.

items.lore: There is an ornate inscription entwined with a runic design on the back. necel il etlduhsulludaces kec keslud cef. duhesnef il nahes toc netl ifikc uc kricr lifrah. 14  7al sifkel
items.name: Astrolabe

items.lore: Every stride leaves a footstep of violet, trailing your path. The flower buds peek out of the ground as if nervous, and after a moment's hesitation, burgeon -- blooming hysteria into the hearts of man.
items.name: Wysteria Glooms

items.lore: You will do what is right, whether they like it or not.
items.name: Reviled Saviour

items.lore: This turquoise mask burns into your skin, binding flesh and stone. The flames are a constant reminder of the balance between creation and destruction, and that the fire which sustains can also consume.
items.name: Xiuhtecuhtli

majorIds.Tackle: Flying Kick deals much more knockback and increases Collide damage by an additional 150%, 60%, and 10%.

items.lore: An age of oxidation. To assert that you will remain, and others all across the world will be left behind. To overwhelm everything with toxic air, ensuring that extinctions follow your wake. Some stop breathing, but the gears of time march on.
items.name: Proterozoic

items.lore: To fight for a cause so overwhelmingly greater than themselves, under that lofty, unreachable banner. What will they do if it all comes crumbling down; when beliefs and ideals rot away, reduced to naught but ash?
items.name: Ruinous

majorIds.Desperate Measures: Walk Speed increases by 1% and Jump Height increases by 2% for every 1% hp missing

items.lore: You have gotten tired of the abyss staring back. Embrace it in a finale that leaves no survivors.
items.name: Final Spark

items.lore: Recovered from subterranean ash deposits, these timeworn greaves are one of many relics of war buried in combat by an ancient eruption. Entombed by millennia of rock and soil, the ideologies of the belligerents have been long forgotten: all that remains is their endless desire for absolution.
items.name: Enshrouded Eruption

items.lore: You awake in a cold sweat, finding yourself in control of two more arms and a hard exterior. You cannot make any sense of what is happening inside yourself. You cannot even explain it to yourself. How about you sleep a little bit longer and forget all this nonsense?
items.name: Carcinization

items.lore: A rage has built up in the stones around you. A slow burn, a creeping fury gradually grown throughout the ages. It demands release.
items.name: Rhyolitic Wrath

items.lore: A sweet tune permeates the air. A whistle on the waves; a melody from the depths. It calls forth destruction in seafoam and sand, and those who hear its call do not breathe for long.
items.name: Song of the Sea

items.lore: An age of inundation. To overwhelm a vicious hell with immense waves, and protest the hand of fate. To harbor the beginning of life, and nurture a world of growth. From the fire, we are born.
items.name: Archean

majorIds.Lunge: Hop and Leap's horizontal velocity is greatly increased.

items.lore: Threaded with strands of silk from a giant moth, it allows the wearer to dash through the air.
items.name: Mothwing Cloak

items.lore: Found at the bottom of a hydrothermal trench, this incredibly dense stone has been warped and shifted into the shape of armor, containing the strength of the Earth, its water, and all of its awe-inspiring heat.
items.name: Drenched Igneous

items.lore: The law of the ancients was clear on the matter. The law of the jungle was, too. Tradition and nature agree: power can only be held by those with the strength to wield it.
items.name: Shogun

items.lore: Chronological anomalies sometimes split themselves open, with no rhyme or reason. Catch one at the right time, and you'll find yourself somewhen else.
items.name: Timeskip

items.lore: Countless lifetimes flash by in an instant. Will you break the cycle, or be consumed by the tides of eternity?
items.name: Samsara

items.lore: Those who believe in chances are the most foolish - every step forward is a step closer to demise. Greed blinds their eyes, as it guides their souls to eternal despair.
items.name: Gambler's Ruin

items.lore: Standing hundreds of metres in the sky, the mist hides the ground far below you. Every step must be taken with caution, or else-
items.name: Hypsophobia

items.lore: What's the point of your journey if it all just leads to nothing?
items.name: Null Space

items.lore: These leggings were forged in honour of a martyr, who, legend has it, fought off a horde of the marauders for two days without food or rest to defend his village.
items.name: Champion's Valiance

majorIds.Perfect Recall: Memory Recollection speeds up Chaos Explosion by 0.1s per spell but increases Chaos Explosion's mana bank requirement by 30.

items.lore: Wouldn't it be nice to just let go and let something else take the wheel every now and then?
items.name: Autopilot

majorIds.Lockdown: Meteor will snap onto a target in range, regardless of aim.

items.lore: The falling sun shall be your demise.
items.name: Last Sun

items.lore: You're the only one left. The only light remaining to lift this world out of endless night. Push on; one day, you may make it.
items.name: Last Stand

majorIds.Altruism: Nearby players gain 100% of the health you gain from Health Regen and Life Steal.

items.lore: I am thou... Thou art I.
items.name: Arsene

items.lore: An age of formation. To spark the chain reaction of everything, and to predate nothing. To bombard the world with violent impact after violent impact, building a beautiful, delicate foundation from the firestorm of the cosmos. All things must begin.
items.name: Hadean

items.lore: She's taken all you have. Your blood. Your sweat. Your tears. You must repay the debt, no matter the consequences, so that what was stolen will be returned tenfold.
items.name: Confiscated

items.lore: A gentle, warm glow for the weak, and flames of condemnation for the wicked. Such is the doctrine you follow, and thus, the will you shall enact upon this earth.
items.name: Shamash

items.lore: Your wit picked bare, the raw burn of reality exposing your fresh warped self to the world. Your abilities magnified, a new power ripping free from under your skin. You have traded your mind for something far, far greater.
items.name: Bartered Memory

items.lore: There is a certain fascination to what lies beyond our grasp, to the spaces we cannot quite see. Harness that pull, draw in your foe, bend it to your will. What could go wrong?
items.name: Nova

items.lore: History measures empires; what are you, if not but a subtle flicker-masked within the brilliance of generations past?
items.name: Gleam

majorIds.Ice Storm: Arrow Shield and Snowstorm's radius' increase by 6 blocks. Arrow Shield's charges are doubled, but no longer give defense.

items.lore: Whipping, chilling winds, and circling hailstones the size of boulders-the eye of your storm is the only safe place to be.
items.name: Baleful Blizzard

items.lore: Stand up, fight back.
items.name: Rebel Ethos

majorIds.Explosive Impact: Exploding gives an additional chance to deal 300% Main Attack damage in a radius of 5 blocks upon killing an enemy.

items.lore: Your limbs fail you, and yet you still stand. Something, someone, has invaded your body, and it will use you until your last breath.
items.name: Ahriman

majorIds.Scarce Comfort: Freestream Flow becomes slightly stronger and lasts indefinitely.

items.lore: Join the fight.
items.name: Dissenter's Refuge

items.lore: You have seen the worst the world has to offer, and met it with a cold, determined gaze. You kill for those who cannot defend themselves. The battle is everlasting, but you are a durable soldier. Push through; for honour, for glory, for truth.
items.name: Fidelius

items.lore: Break free. Free from the constraints of the flesh, free from the constraints of the mind, free from the constraints of the self.
items.name: Libertas

items.lore: The leaves in this coronet cackle and hiss, a cacophony of malicious intent. They would just as soon shred your enemies to bits as remove your own head from your shoulders.
items.name: Crown of Vicious Leaves

majorIds.Rock Shield: Arrow Shield's defense is increased by 10%, but its number of charges is reduced by 1.

items.lore: Ground yourself. Your heart beats to the rhythm of the earth. With the weight of the world supporting you, nothing can break your stride.
items.name: Steadfast

items.lore: The most poignant anthems are the toils of a tortured soul, a haunting, heart-wrenching melody from which one can never turn away.
items.name: Symphonie Fantastique

majorIds.Forest's Blessing: Your hound gains 50% more movement speed, attack speed and vision. Arrow Bomb's damage is reduced by -30%.

items.lore: It is what it is.
items.name: Tautology

items.lore: You'll connive, coerce, lure them in and control it all. Until all cards are set, all pieces in place. Then, when they've all exhausted their usefulness...
items.name: Machinations

items.internalName: Inconceivably Deranged Paper Mask of Legendary Victory
items.lore: This cheap paper mask drawn in the likeness of Herbert von Legendary as he was having a complete nervous breakdown after having his life threatened by people who would not stop challenging him, is handed over in the ill-conceived hope of easing the murderous tendencies of those who have spent unnecessary amounts of time, broken the mold, gone even further beyond, pushed onward to prove that they will not stop, ultimately garnered an unhealthy obsession, and then came to blows in Doctor Legendary's house demanding further prizes all for the singularly unsettling and quite possibly sociopathic purpose of spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge. The inside has the names and addresses of multiple notable psychoanalysts written with a hastily-scrawled note from Doctor Legendary himself begging that you stop completing the Legendary Challenge and go get therapy before you do something to him that would constitute legal action against you.
items.name: Inconceivably Deranged Paper Mask of Legendary Victory

items.lore: What lies beneath the brim of all that never was, that overflowing vastness which cannot spill?
items.name: Nonexistence

majorIds.Pounce: Escape becomes a forward lunge.

majorIds.Napalm: Fire Creep increases Arrow Bomb damage by +15%, but deals 15 times the self-damage and lowers velocity. Scorched Earth radius is increased and deals +65%.

majorIds.Pirouette: Dancing Blade enhances Dash. Dashing into an enemy now vaults you upwards and resets dash as if you touched the ground.

items.lore: The sky knows no bounds.
items.name: Skyline Bliss

items.lore: It's a strange feeling, running forever to reach the horizon knowing another lies just as far past.
items.name: Aleph Null

items.lore: Adherence to the laws of good is important- it's why one fights the spread of corruption, after all. Though whether to follow the spirit or the letter... perhaps they too can be bent to your will.
items.name: Adherence

items.lore: Sink into infinite synchronous beats with the intricate rhythm of fractals and spirals and patterns, and patterns, and patterns that reach to the pulsating stars and then back to the ground where the people are dancing to songs they don't know under stars that turn ‘round, and around, and around, as the spiral is starting again . . .
items.name: Mesmerizing Madness

items.lore: The Expanse holds an exigent paranoia, a hamartia for even the most renowned heroes. Only a survivor knows to hoard intelligence, showing their hand only when none will be left to recount it.
items.name: Taciturn

items.lore: There's a new voice in your head. An echo, a scratch at the back of your brain, bursting with all the memories of a life you've never led and the desires of a will you do not hold and the fears of a mind that is not yours. Won't you let it out? After all, two hearts beat stronger than one.
items.name: Transplanted Psyche

items.internalName: Outlandish Replica Face Mask of Legendary Victory
items.lore: This perfect-to-the-point-of-indistinguishability replica mask of Herbert von Legendary's face, painstakingly crafted by Corkus's most powerful machines with only the most expensive materials and featuring real moustache hair plucked from Doctor Legendary's face, is desperately handed over to attempt to placate those who have spent an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge, broken the mold by continuing to spend an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge, gone even further beyond spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge, pushed onward to prove that they will not stop spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge, and then ultimately garnered an unhealthy obsession for spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge.
items.name: Outlandish Replica Face Mask of Legendary Victory

items.lore: "A little belief, and just a little spirit, can go a long way."
items.name: Verglas Spirit

items.lore: Hidden amongst the foundations of the Expanse are anomalous fragments wrapped in an otherworldly power. While unsettling to the touch, the strength they impart is too tempting to ignore.
items.name: Xenolith

items.lore: Every power has its costs, and every triumph has its toll. Wager everything you treasure-it will all be worth in the end.
items.name: Martingale

majorIds.Heartbeat: Arrow Shield is set to 2 charges but deals doubled damage. Arrow Wall instead triples Arrow Shield damage and doubles Guardian Angels ammo.

items.lore: The intersection of what can be and what is. The apotheosis of being. Shear away the unclean, the impure, the rotten; leave only the raw, blinding truth of the self.
items.name: Platonic Ideal

items.lore: A million stinging needles, tangled around your head; A crown of thorns; A wreath of nematocysts; A chaplet of venom and pain. From that poison cup, you drink and drink, until-Like a jellyfish-Only the currents decide your way. Until only an addictive Hate compels you.
items.name: Cnidarian Hellspawn

items.lore: In such a sinister and wicked expanse, one wonders if the best solution is to give up your eyes and replace them with a pair that does not indulge in such evils, cleansing them from your idyllic field of view while the wider world around you withers away.
items.name: Myopia

items.internalName: Treasured Diamond Mask of Legendary Victory
items.lore: This excessively ornate to-the-point-of-being-wasteful decorative mask, laser-cut from a meter's worth of pure diamond, is given to those who have spent an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge, broken the mold by continuing to spend an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge, gone even further beyond spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge, and then pushed onward to prove that they will not stop spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge.
items.name: Treasured Diamond Mask of Legendary Victory

items.lore: Are your heart, soul, and mind one? The ones who love are the most vulnerable. The ones who persist are the most detached. The ones who forget are the most naive. Only when you remove these impurities from your body could you reach the end.
items.name: Wanderlust

majorIds.Divine Honor: Increases the bonus from Radiance by 5%. Bash deals -15% per hit.

items.lore: A soul sacrificed willingly, to an eternity in captivity. Imprints and memories; all that remain of a hero of the lands.
items.name: Phantasmal Hostage

majorIds.Strings of Fate: Your puppets have a lifetime of 3 seconds and deal 50% increased damage with attacks and explosions.

items.lore: It's a wicked dream come true-their purpose is pain, both others' and their own; their will is naught but your command.
items.name: Schadenfreude

items.lore: The enemy of your enemy is your friend. It's naught but a ceasefire of convenience, if not necessity, yet it's a chance to lick your wounds and focus your might against the threat at hand.
items.name: Fragile Truce

items.lore: Despite the valley being overtaken by anomalous forces, the toughest flora has managed to avoid extinction. Their coiling vines and roots remind you that even in the most dire of situations, you will never go quietly.
items.name: Withstand

items.internalName: Venerated Gold Mask of Legendary Victory
items.lore: This excessively ornate decorative mask, moulded from 24 carat gold, is awarded to those who have both spent an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge and broken the mold by continuing to spend an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge, and then gone even further beyond spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge.
items.name: Venerated Gold Mask of Legendary Victory

majorIds.Gentle Glow: Orphion's Pulse restores up to 25% more max health to allies, but heals at a slower rate. Fluid Healing's effectiveness is increased by 150%.

items.lore: The unearthly wood of eyestalk is durable, but with horrific cost. Pieces severed from the trunk continue to collect and cultivate the essence of abandoned eyes, and the unfortunate wearer becomes a catalyst for growth.
items.name: Keratoconus

items.lore: Visions unknowable and faces unnamed. A violent cacophony with no end in sight. But beyond that- a clarity. A fleeting moment where the rules speak their names, just on the other side. You need to get closer. You need to be able to see.
items.name: Impossibility Threshold

items.internalName: Revered Silver Mask of Legendary Victory
items.lore: This ornate decorative mask, fashioned from pure silver, is awarded to those who have spent an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge and broken the mold by continuing to spend an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge.
items.name: Revered Silver Mask of Legendary Victory

items.lore: Engraved with the beauty and mystery of the boreal lights, this ornately-crafted crown is given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.
items.name: Boreal-Patterned Crown

items.lore: In the moments before an all but inescapable death, time slows down, and the pace of battle becomes yours. By mastering the escape, you can face death on command, reaping the benefits at will before the reaper reaches you.
items.name: Resolution

items.lore: Orders, cannonfire, calls for surrender-the wind carries all. To ride the winds is to harness the lifeblood of battle, infiltrating up the veins of command with mere token resistance.
items.name: Windborne

majorIds.Magnet: Pulls items dropped by mobs towards you.

items.lore: No one knows how this extremely dense chestplate can even logically exist. It is almost paradoxical in nature, and affects its wearers in unfathomable ways.
items.name: Gravity

majorIds.Intangible: The knockback you take is drastically reduced, and reflected damage deals large knockback.

items.lore: It permeates around you, so subtly, enveloping your very being with a shroud on the cusp of impalpability. Nothing can affect you now - the incorporeal hiding in plain sight.
items.name: Dark Matter

items.lore: Made of dark minerals and adorned with pure obsidian, this ornately-crafted helmet is given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.
items.name: Obsidian-Framed Helmet

items.lore: The oddly uncomfortable helmet was hand sculpted from a mystic clay found only in the depths of Molten Heights. Not much is known about the substance.
items.name: Pisces

items.lore: Infused with the classical magicks of fire, water, and thunder, this ornately-crafted chestplate is given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.
items.name: Anima-Infused Cuirass

items.lore: Dedicated to a place of courage revered by all warriors, this ornately-crafted chestplate is given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.
items.name: Elysium-Engraved Aegis

items.lore: Despite the absence of natural light, in the deepest reaches of the Void grows foliage and flora capable of sustaining itself by absorbing latent energy. Such an accomplishment is to be admired, ideally from a keen distance.
items.name: Etiolation

majorIds.Superconductor: Chain Lightning channels three massive lightning bolts through you, arcing to enemies within 8 blocks for 225% and stunning them for 1s. You take 10% more damage for 4s.

items.lore: To wear the mark is more than a show of allegiance. It is a willingness to channel the might of the gods at whatever cost, as the fate of the battle is worth more than surviving to see its end.
items.name: Insignia

items.internalName: Esteemed Bronze Mask of Legendary Victory
items.lore: This decorative mask, crafted of bronze alloys, is awarded only to those who have spent an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge.
items.name: Esteemed Bronze Mask of Legendary Victory

items.lore: Forged in direct tribute to the earth and its aspects, these ornately-crafted boots are given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.
items.name: Gaea-Hewn Boots

items.lore: Only the naive celebrate a ceasefire. Not a second wasted, a merciless arms race against the inevitability of war has left you ready to unleash hell the moment the armistice breaks.
items.name: Antebellum

items.lore: Consecrated by Qira herself with blessings unknown to all but her, these ornately-crafted leggings are given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.
items.name: Eden-Blessed Guards

items.lore: The strong can hammer foe and nature alike into submission, waging war with indiscriminate force. The truly powerful pit them against each other on a whim, weaving stone and verdure into an elaborate web of attrition that beats with the heart of an entire world. What is an enemy compared to all the might of the Earth?
items.name: Mazeweaver

items.lore: With threads of fundamentally opposing magic delicately woven together, these ornately-crafted greaves are given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.
items.name: Chaos-Woven Greaves

items.lore: The sheer bond between Adamastor and Urdar has manifested itself into a physical form due to their duress. Such power is not to be abused...
items.name: Dondasch

items.lore: An impenetrable fortress' greatest strength is psychological, a mythos built on the backs of a thousand attackers it has withstood. Your greatest strength is the belief that not one of those thousand could hold a candle to you.
items.name: Cannonade

majorIds.Dauntless Inferno: Courage casts a series of 5 infernos that expand after the last, dealing 125% each, and grants 20% resistance instead of a damage boost.

items.lore: This is futile, a fight against odds so great you may as well challenge the force of fate itself. Yet there is pride to be found in delaying the inevitable, so stand your ground and fight to the end.
items.name: Titanomachia

items.lore: An ephemeral moment in time captured by sheer force of magic, this ornately-crafted cloak is given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.
items.name: Twilight-Gilded Cloak

items.lore: Steeped in the deepest energies of the Ahms region void, these ornately-crafted leggings are given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.
items.name: Abyss-Imbued Leggings

items.lore: Honoring a mythical dwarven smith lost to the legends, these ornately-crafted boots are given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.
items.name: Hephaestus-Forged Sabatons

items.lore: Crystalline towers and stark white horizons. The sharpest frost shards and the softest snowfall. Before the permafrost monarch of winter, lay your heart down: become the right hand of the cold.
items.name: Frozen Devotion

majorIds.Plague: Poisoned mobs spread their poison to nearby mobs.

majorIds.Expunge: When using Heal, cast one instant pulse that heals 15% of your max health.

majorIds.Altruism: Nearby players gain 100% of the health you gain from Health Regen and Life Steal.

items.lore: Childhood memories, days of late nights and snow fights and cocoa by the fireside. Loving smiles and friendly faces. The beating heart of the world: home. This is what you fight for, beating back those dark and wicked forces which work to break down all that is loved. There is no sacrifice too great for the hearth.
items.name: Hearthkeeper

items.lore: A once-great hero left behind these sturdy, reliable greaves, trusting those after her to be able to use their power to protect others, should they don them. Her courage fuels their wearers.
items.name: Vaward

items.lore: During a spiritual journey to Kato temple, the sage Capian was presented with powerful spiritual boots with the intention to be used for peaceful magic, and not hard combat.
items.name: Capricorn

items.lore: Crudely misshapen greaves made from haphazard scrap found about the Starfield. You sense a foreboding notion that donning such a thing would be the end of sensing anything at all.
items.name: Titanium Grievers

items.lore: Those whose souls are lost to the Canyon of the Lost eternally seek form. They inhabit those who wear these boots, unknowingly dragging the soul of the wearer into their ranks if worn for too long, leaving a wandering husk.
items.name: Revenant

items.lore: Something is lurking-it must be, in the eerie silence that leaves you so utterly alone. And these remains... Are they a reminder of one who didn't stay quiet, or does what lurks in the unknown already know you're here?
items.name: Doomsday Omen

items.lore: This dark relic was found at the very bottom of the deepest trench of the ocean. It drains all light surrounding it, blinding everything in a strange abyssal darkness.
items.name: Aphotic

items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!
items.name: Petrichor

items.lore: Forged from the storm-touched ether, this chest piece calls its wearer to rise above the sky. With every step, the pull of the earth weakens. Jump, and for a moment, you are weightless-caught between the clouds and the stars. Leap, and the heavens may answer.
items.name: Stratosphere

items.lore: 450 years ago a demonic plague like no other spread through Gavel, killing thousands. That is, until a priest encased the disease inside a helmet and warned everyone never to wear it.
items.name: Necrosis

items.lore: Sheer strength exudes from these Orcish relics, simple sandals ill-fitting to humans or Villagers. Enchanted with power and rage rather than magic, the strength that is provided when they are worn is unparalleled.
items.name: Warchief

items.lore: The make of this massive cloak is unlike anything seen before among the provinces. Foreign images shift and melt in ethereal projections within the inside.
items.name: Hetusol

items.lore: Echoes of the Fracturing persist in the Sky at scales unimaginable, implying a power so all-encompassing it leaves you in awe.
items.name: Sweeping Majesty

majorIds.Windsurf: Righting Reflex has 75% reduced fall speed, lasts twice as long, and is affected stronger by movement speed.

items.lore: A tag on the inside of the hat reads: "Do not fly during thunderstorms! The wearer is liable for all injuries sustained while using this product."
items.name: Propeller Hat

items.lore: These hollowed spikes still hold the lingering embers of the event that formed this caldera long ago, lending an almost unnatural glow. It's a comforting warmth, though the force of the eruption remains dormant, primed for the slightest push.
items.name: Scorched Antiquity

majorIds.Alter Ego: Awakened can be activated after saving 40% less mana, but its duration is reduced by 25%.

items.lore: Wybels have a strange attraction to cosmic magic, and many an owner will find them staring through the window at night. One, however, claims to have seen her Wybel making something out of white stardust. The abode was robbed shortly after, and the supposed item gone missing without confirmation of its existence.
items.name: Stardew

items.lore: An eerie glimpse into what once was, shining beautifully in the infinite expanse of the Void. As tragic a tale it is, perhaps it is better left a wisp.
items.name: Ghostly Quasar

items.lore: These common leather boots were once owned by a barbarian with no magical prowess. Instead of enchanting it, he coated the soles in corrupted shards to punish those who opposed him.
items.name: Virgo

items.lore: In the marbling of wood grain. Drying moisture in the cobbles. Clumps of flowers. Tree bark, birth marks, the pattern of this plate - unflinching faces trapped, now revealed. The question pierces your mind: what shape will I be hewn into, one day?
items.name: Blank Stare

majorIds.Dead Weight: Totem's horizontal velocity is greatly increased at the cost of vertical movement.

majorIds.Perilous Flare: Pyrokinesis moves much slower, but has an increased Area of Effect and  +50%.

items.lore: "Discernable by it's one-second glow, the cypress firefly makes it home amidst the ash of the upper heights, blending in with the fiery landscape." -Delinaed's Guide to Local Species, 2nd Edition.
items.name: Cypress Amber

items.lore: The hide of the Touroto, an almost invincible Bull-like creature, is said to be pierced only by the horn of the Touroto itself, making it extremely valuable.
items.name: Taurus

items.lore: Many prophecies foretell of new eras. Most are fabricated or proven false in time. One passed through the Dogun caverns, however, tells of a dawn soon to break, in which the earth shall run red and return to flame. Fanatical sects whisper the coming of a new demonic god.
items.name: Dawnbreak

items.lore: Able to withstand the grasp of claws of pure steel, the perch of the Minokawa thrums with the might of a beast that can devour the sun. Given free reign of the skies, even the brightest of stars are no match.
items.name: Perch of the Shrouded Sun

items.lore: A pair of glowing sabatons crafted from time-lost relics. Somehow, despite just creating them, you get the feeling that you've worn these before...
items.name: Ephemeris

majorIds.Phoenix-Born: Health Regeneration is increased by 0.75% for every 1% Health missing.

items.lore: From the ashes, let a hero rise anew.
items.name: Firebird

items.lore: Abandoned by the dwarven Ramriders in their heyday, this hefty armor forged to protect a steed sees little use but littering the steppes of the upper heights. A memento of a slaughter, in days long past.
items.name: Eradian Cuissards

majorIds.Sorcery: 25% chance for spells and attacks to cast a second time at no additional cost.

items.lore: You only have limited time. But what if, you could experience that time again? And again, and again...
items.name: Time Rift

items.lore: Despite being thin enough to blow away in the wind, this mineral-blended shawl holds the force of a supervolcano within its soft fabric.
items.name: Shawl of Gaea

items.lore: The gods of air and thunder, frustrated with being physically insubstantial alone, decided to band together to forge the ultimate leggings of defense.
items.name: Gemini

items.lore: In the shadow of the Sun, a storm of unmistakable hatred follows. One which, however ephemeral, may only yield to the great pyres like these in the minutes it has to spare.
items.name: Pulse Storm

items.lore: Radioactive emissions caused by starfall seeps into the mind, the atoms, the Soul. Transfiguring organic matter into something new, something sinister. It's only through sheer force of will that victims of such a thing break free from themselves, and their imperfect vessels... into something beautiful.
items.name: Radiation

items.lore: Forged directly from the bloody red stone mined from the Nether, they were locked away for fear of inciting insanity in those who wore them.
items.name: Nether's Scar

items.lore: For the belief of the cosmos' defilement, the moon was noted to remain unchanged. Those with this belief live only for the light of the moon, desperately seeking to maintain it through means that would only darken the soul of the most devout. Such from them comes the word lunacy.
items.name: Moontower

items.lore: "The symbol of the river" is a name that is often synonymous with this garment, with many water like qualities surrounding it, heavily bathed in magical meaning.
items.name: Aquarius

items.lore: Sculpted by searing flames and dazzling light, in the years since the Fracturing the Greatbirds' nest has developed a blinding glow. It has both immense power and volatility, yet seems to hold a hidden strength for one who can tame its spirit.
items.name: Greatbird Eyrie

majorIds.Hawkeye: Arrow Hurricane becomes a condensed stream of 25 arrows, dealing 45%, 6%, and 6% each.

items.lore: Many artifacts are found to incite rage in the wearer, and wizards old and new alike conjecture as to the purpose of them. Very few increase the latent abilities of the wearers to ensure havoc, and none to such a degree as these boots.
items.name: Slayer

items.lore: The hide of the centaur is extraordinarily magical in the right hands. It is told to allow the user to gain the swiftness of the horse, but also leaves them vulnerable to hard hitting attacks.
items.name: Sagittarius

items.lore: This thick skinned jacket, imbued with the courage of a thousand lion hearts, will grant the user massive protection from all who target them.
items.name: Leo

majorIds.Gruesome Knots: Bleeding and Twisted Tether deal double damage, but Bleeding duration is reduced.

items.lore: Every ounce of your suffering must be made worth it. Otherwise, what was the point of it all?
items.name: Pain Cycle

items.lore: The last known crafts of Theorick before his fall in battle were pieces of armour crafted out of pure ice, all of which have melted save for these shimmering boots. The coldest gales and most suffocating heat nurture and repair the wearer instead of being stifling or deadly.
items.name: Boreal

items.lore: Two iron horns adorn this helmet to enhance the warriors of the Eradian, Dwarves who specifically rode Rams into battle at incredible speed.
items.name: Aries

items.lore: A wolf and a rabbit met in the woods. The rabbit was injured; the wolf spared it. The two grew close. One day, the rabbit fell into a hunter's trap. It was terrified, surrounded by armed men. The wolf burst from the trees, fighting the men back, even as they shot it with their bows, long enough for the rabbit to run away. It never saw the wolf again.
items.name: Protector's Parable

items.lore: Life itself is not a flexible material to work with-building sentience is precisely like squeezing blood from a stone. It may be years of toil, but the strength of an entire race that looks to you as a creator cannot be overstated.
items.name: Abiogenesis

items.lore: Forged with the raw powers of both the earth and the sea, these boots were initially an attempt at creating a method of foot-travel over the seas. Despite the spectacular failure of that application, they remain a formidable and reliable set of armor.
items.name: Galleon

items.lore: All those who wear these enchanted boots deposit a single fond memory into them. They are forgotten forever, but wearing them recalls every memory within vividly.
items.name: Memento

items.lore: Perennial, in a sense-these plants cycle through a unique bloom for every season. When they fully form, the breathtaking equinox is said to shine with an otherworldly light.
items.name: Equinox Blossom

items.lore: ...As the heart fails, adrenaline pumps through the body in an attempt to provide energy and keep the victim alive, but medical action must be taken to ensure survival. -Excerpt from Aldorei Medical Tomes, Vol. 6
items.name: Cardiac Arrest

majorIds.Soul Eater: Devour and Harvester grant double mana. Decreases maximum marks by 1.

majorIds.Sublimation: Totemic Shatter heals 75% of Regeneration's usual amount at the cost of 2 blocks of radius.

items.lore: An antique passed from the Caritat wreckage into the hands of the outcast elves of Efilim. So to honor the memory of the selfless family as inspired their self-imposed exile, their strongest healing spells were imbued into it, and sent to those who needed them most.
items.name: Resurgence

items.lore: Before the invention of magical weight detectors, there was a giant pair of public scales in Cinfras. Instead of being thrown away, they were reforged to be a formidable piece of armour.
items.name: Libra

items.lore: A condition of severely deficient supply of oxygen to the body that arises from abnormal breathing; practitioners that abuse specific magic combos are often found incapacitated by said condition.
items.name: Asphyxia

majorIds.Reckless Abandon: Sacrifice War Scream's defense bonus to give Tempest +5%, +15%, 5% and 3 extra hits.

items.lore: "Death claims your soul..."
items.name: Untimely Demise

majorIds.Explosive Impact: Exploding gives an additional chance to deal 300% Main Attack damage in a radius of 5 blocks upon killing an enemy.

majorIds.Transcendence: 25% chance for spells to cost no mana when casted.

items.lore: This patchwork of shells from the Corkian Astrochelys makes for quite the statement sweater; it keeps your neck warm and besides, your foes' fashion fancies feel frivolous, anyway.
items.name: Quilted Carapace

items.lore: One of the very few physically-powerful artifacts of the Villagers, these boots were used in the initial crusades against the Green-skins, to overpower the Orcs via raw physical might. Though effective, they have not seen use in a long time.
items.name: Crusade Sabatons

items.lore: The carapace of the common Maexi pet fire scarabs, while alone, only cause minor burns to the touch. However, when woven together, they produce a variety of cumulative effects.
items.name: Scorpio

items.lore: The Phoenix Prince is a mythical figure spoken of in Avos legend. His crown cursed him in an endless cycle of death and rebirth.
items.name: Phoenix Prince's Crown

majorIds.Hurricane's Eye: Violent Vortex applies 2 marks to every enemy it hits.

majorIds.Geocentrism: Aura radiates from you instead of your Totem and can be cast any time.

items.lore: Wealth and riches...but at what cost?
items.name: Discoverer

items.lore: Forged from mystic, previously unknown metals revealed in the deepest dwarven mining site to date, these sleek, glowing greaves are believed to be utterly indestructible.
items.name: Greaves of the Veneer

majorIds.Sorcery: 25% chance for spells and attacks to cast a second time at no additional cost.

items.lore: The Bantisu monks have developed this enigmatic sigil in their years of meditation and study. It blesses the wearer with luck and powerful psionic ability.
items.name: Third Eye

majorIds.Escape Route: Frenzy and Time Dilation charge twice as fast but also decay twice as fast.

items.lore: The old facemasks of the Eradian guards were forged from raw magma, and enchanted to remain searingly hot, so as to brand the wearer eternally with the mark of Rodoroc's elite.
items.name: Grillface

items.lore: Nothing more.
items.name: Cessation

items.lore: Tisaun, a warrior tasked to fend off a corrupted siege alone, could find only a thin shirt and rusted spear to use before the attack. He defeated all 1000 enemies without taking a scratch, and his bravery infused his gear with that same strength.
items.name: Tisaun's Valor

majorIds.Altruism: Nearby players gain 100% of the health you gain from Health Regen and Life Steal.

majorIds.Freerunner: When your sprint bar is under 30% full, increase your sprint speed by +150%.

majorIds.Lightweight: You no longer take fall damage.

items.lore: A rogue inventor stole the plans for a steam jet booster from Corkus and reverse engineered them onto a set of boots. While effective, they are dangerous, prone to catastrophic failure.
items.name: Steamjet Walkers

items.lore: This battered stone mask is of unknown origin, and has no openings for the eyes whatsoever. Indeed, all that can be seen while wearing it is that which makes you truly angry.
items.name: Outrage

majorIds.Taunt: Provoke's Cooldown is lowered by -3s.

majorIds.Sorcery: 25% chance for spells and attacks to cast a second time at no additional cost.

items.lore: You know better than anyone else that there's always a sliver of truth behind the tallest of tales.
items.name: Runebound Chains

majorIds.Lunge: Hop and Leap's horizontal velocity is greatly increased.

items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!
items.name: Albedo

items.lore: Donning this helmet sears your mind with images of a world on fire. These blistering thoughts pressure you to make that world a reality.
items.name: Conflagrate

majorIds.Rock Shield: Arrow Shield's defense is increased by 10%, but its number of charges is reduced by 1.

items.lore: Sometimes it takes a heart of stone to do what must be done.
items.name: Granitic Mettle

items.lore: The Wanderer; the Betrayer; the Lunatic.
items.name: Valse Vaincue

items.lore: A marvel of Corkus' electromagical advancements, this high-tech chestplate is equipped with steam jets to boost the user's speed, at a minimal cost to protection.
items.name: Booster Plate

majorIds.Temblor: Bash gains +1 Area of Effect and is 0.05s faster.

items.lore: The last step towards purity. Dissolve and coagulate. Be anew.
items.name: Iosis

items.lore: This suit was clearly designed by the hand of a mechanic, though its purpose is unknown. There are quite a lot of buttons on it though, so let's press this one!
items.name: Gadgeteer

items.lore: Wearing this deceptively simple shroud causes the user to fade into the shadows, sometimes flickering out of existence for a moment.
items.name: Dark Shroud

items.lore: This matted tangle of vines and marshland plants contains various herbal remedies woven into it. It is oddly comfortable, despite the thorns coating the inside.
items.name: Fenmask

majorIds.Saviour's Sacrifice: While under 50% maximum health, nearby allies gain 15% bonus damage and defence.

items.lore: The last stand, a hero's rally, a turning tide-is it a tale of a champion who conquered, or a martyr who inspired? This is your story to tell.
items.name: Eleventh Hour

items.lore: In sleep we are unfettered, unhindered by the choices we make. In dream we are unbound, set free to the limits of imagination.
items.name: Traumerei

items.lore: The depths of the seas, where the waves flow fierce and fast and wash away the agonies of the world.
items.name: Water Sanctuary

items.lore: The harmony of the elements, a world which sings its truth for all who dare listen, words spoken which can be felt but never known. The Sanctuary, in its whole.
items.name: Rainbow Sanctuary

items.lore: Fashioned from the cut tails of the now extinct Venti, these nearly immaterial boots are light as air and crackle with lightning.
items.name: Ventus Tail

items.lore: The house of the flames, where the sky runs red with rage and passion burns through every soul.
items.name: Fire Sanctuary

items.lore: True to their promise, these goggles were left as a memento for Ohms when his lover Gale finally died. Light as air, Gale's carefree nature lends itself to those who don them.
items.name: Gale's Sight

majorIds.Pounce: Escape becomes a forward lunge.

items.lore: The heart of the earth, where the ground blooms beautiful blossoms and life grows untethered.
items.name: Earth Sanctuary

items.lore: The expanse of the skies, where the wind whistles a warbling anthem and the air extends onward forever.
items.name: Air Sanctuary

items.lore: The home of the storms, where the cramped clouds crackle and power surges in sharp bolts.
items.name: Thunder Sanctuary

majorIds.Divine Honor: Increases the bonus from Radiance by 5%. Bash deals -15% per hit.

items.lore: Smooth yet unassuming, this hollowed piece feels as if it lay untouched for millennia as the chaos that formed eastern Gavel unfolded around it. No blemish nor order, just nature preserved in its most perfect form.
items.name: Pristine Antiquity

majorIds.Cherry Bombs: Turns Smoke Bomb into firecrackers that fly farther, tighter, and deal 100%, 30%, 30%, and 30% instantly.

items.lore: No reign lasts forever. Not while your schemes remain unnoticed.
items.name: Conspirator's Trickpockets

majorIds.Plague: Poisoned mobs spread their poison to nearby mobs.

items.lore: A silhouette of forgotten strength, its essence lingering like a half remembered dream. It no longer boasts the sharpness it once had, yet the stories etched into its very being refuse to fade.
items.name: Obsolescent Panoply

items.lore: Andesite is a stone commonly used for weapons and construction, but tends to be ineffective as armor when impure. This sturdy chestplate, however, is testament to the strength of pure andesite.
items.name: Andesite Aegis

majorIds.Entropy: Meteor's speed is increased by 50%.

items.lore: These leggings are the last remaining piece of a historical set of armor, created with such power as to be thought impossible long ago.
items.name: Post-Ultima

items.lore: All legends must one day fall, but their legacy shall be remembered forevermore. These memories exist in the hearts of all, and pave the path forward in hopes to create a world where all may find peace, however rocky that path may be.
items.name: Babel

items.lore: While only a mockery of the original product, this line of helmets became wildly popular before legal disputes and safety concerns halted production.
items.name: The Forgery

items.lore: Taken from the Archwraith by a pious Shaman, this chestplate was immediately abandoned. Its few users since have turned to an all-consuming desire to seek out and realign the last vestiges of purity remaining in the Kander Forest.
items.name: Soul Ink

items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!
items.name: Puppeteer

items.lore: An imperfect fit, but you can make a better one.
items.name: Disfigured Vessel

majorIds.Lightweight: You no longer take fall damage.

items.lore: A brilliant relic supposedly originating from the Realm of Light, the creators of these strangely shaped boots are completely unknown.
items.name: Passus Lux

majorIds.Rusted Ichor: Boiling Blood cooldown is reduced by 0.5s and inflicts 40% slowness, but deals no damage.

items.lore: Ancient and new hearts beat as one.
items.name: Reliquiae

majorIds.Rally: Cleansing Breeze heals you for 15% and allies for 20%, but Charge becomes harmless.

items.lore: If the depths of hell allows you this, is staying human an equal trade or a fool's choice?
items.name: Infernal Impulse

majorIds.Gentle Glow: Orphion's Pulse restores up to 25% more max health to allies, but heals at a slower rate. Fluid Healing's effectiveness is increased by 150%.

items.lore: "I have hope in me the likes of which you could never imagine, and despair the likes of which you shall never fathom. If I cannot satisfy the one, then I will indulge the other."
items.name: The Siren's Call

majorIds.Alter Ego: Awakened can be activated after saving 40% less mana, but its duration is reduced by 25%.

items.lore: Memories take on lives of their own, left long enough.
items.name: Phantasmal Remnants

requirements.quest: Realm of Light IV - Finding the Light

items.lore: Ancient magicks are required to make these brilliant glasses, imbued with charity and selflessness. They allow sight beyond sight, rumoured to allow sight of a brilliant realm.
items.name: Clearsight Spectacles

items.lore: Imbued with the blood of the first werewolf, it was kept in Gelibord as a trophy before being stolen. Wearing it is said to mimic the effects of the lycanthropic curse.
items.name: Blood Moon

majorIds.Paragon: Shield Strike deals 600% damage. Mantle of the Bovemist's cooldown is reduced by 15s, but is limited to one shield charge.

items.lore: Just because it's been said to death doesn't mean it isn't true.
items.name: Aphorism

items.lore: Adamantite is a soft metal often added to exotic medicine to increase one's health, but a revolutionary blacksmith on Black Road, created a chestplate with an Adamantite alloy, which is advertised to bolster the users endurance.
items.name: Adamantite

items.lore: Forged on Mage Island, the sparkling liquid-like armour is as hard as obsidian, but light and fluid as water. It glistens with the magic of the ocean winds.
items.name: Crystal

majorIds.Greed: Picking up emeralds heals you and nearby players for 8% max health.

items.lore: Jingle jangle, while shaking your bells. Jingle jangle come the pockets of cash... Catch the trickster, send them to hell," their money is gone and off you've dashed!
items.name: The Jingling Jester

majorIds.Plague: Poisoned mobs spread their poison to nearby mobs.

items.lore: The beauty of this peculiar grotto takes your breath away. Unfortunately, its spores do too...
items.name: Stifling Spores

items.lore: The Blue Mask's physical traits are equal to that of paper, but the mystical properties enhance the wearers personal skills tenfold. The mask is thought to originate from an ancient Dernel tribe.
items.name: Blue Mask

items.lore: Although these boots are crafted from corrupted stone, they do not exhibit any corruptive effects on their wearers. Speculation abounds as to the reason.
items.name: Stalagmites

items.lore: Do you think you can survive with a sky choked by snow and ash? More importantly, do you think anything else can?
items.name: Impact Winter

majorIds.Brachiate: Grappling Hook has 25% increased range and increased velocity.

items.lore: King of the Jungle-it's a title reserved for the apex of the apex, and yet from where you swing across the canopy, this beast of supposed royalty is but another victim of your thievish pursuits.
items.name: Jungle Rogue

items.lore: These boots were standard issue to members of the prestigious, and now disbanded, Sodeta Guild, and given as a gift to the owners of Delnar Mansion one day.
items.name: Sodeta Boots

items.lore: The dark spectres of the decayed forests have created an insidious helmet to drain the spirit of those who wear it, and become servants to their dark whims. Many have fallen to its allure.
items.name: Spectre

items.lore: Salvaged from the limbs of the Vulcor Adrenophage, they radiate extreme heat, suffusing the body they attach to with that same heat. It almost feels as though your blood is heating to a frenetic boil.
items.name: Phage Pins

items.lore: Used by the Temple of the Legends' strongest guard, the shielded plating is enchanted with a powerful ward to stave off the effects of the corruption.
items.name: Kelight's Shield

requirements.quest: Realm of Light III - A Headless History

items.lore: Cosmic energy permeates this deceptively dull-looking chestplate, having been crafted with stardust from a comet that only passes over Wynn every 1000 years.
items.name: Millennium

items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!
items.name: Augoeides

majorIds.Meteor Crash: Burning Sigil gains +6 radius and deals double the damage, but lasts half as long.

items.lore: The cost of survival is immense, with morale running thin and supply lines choked, feeding the strength of an army condensed to a single point, of a people desperate not to give an inch.
items.name: Stronghold

items.lore: Rumored to be crafted from a Dernic stone, these sinister boots radiate extremely powerful dark energy. They have absorbed the power of the raging seas in their time locked in Sarnfic.
items.name: Abysso Galoshes

items.lore: The runic message carved on these enigmatic boots cover hundreds of different languages, many of them disused, but what has been translated seems to describe a disaster soon to arrive to the world.
items.name: Bad Wolf

items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!
items.name: Masochist

items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!
items.name: Antimony

items.lore: Spurred on by a drunken bet, the great Thanos smith Kratke improved a pair of leggings from a rival that were once thought to be perfection.
items.name: Kratke

items.lore: The ancient bones of the demon Garaheth are stronger than steel. They clamp down when worn to constrict the bearer, inciting a slow madness.
items.name: Cage of Bones

items.lore: Death is naught but an inconvenience for the strongest of the corrupted. With time, the weight of destruction will pass, and the fires of War will rise anew from within.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Isostatic Rebound

items.lore: Originating from the unspeakable dark land, looking into the helmet will show nothing but darkness. Wearing it is said to reverse your morality, as if it were draining your will to live into the void.
items.name: Call of the Void

majorIds.Temblor: Bash gains +1 Area of Effect and is 0.05s faster.

items.lore: The scorching heat, the shifting bodies, the screeching cries of anguish... they're all the least of your problems now.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Molten Fleshmass

items.lore: Found on the mangled body of a famous Tromsian general fallen to a corrupted siege some time ago, these boots allow the wearer to remain calm and steadfast in the face of overwhelming odds.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Repose

items.lore: The armor worn by the enigmatic Matryoshka Idol. It appears to have a nearly uncountably high number of inlets and sockets set inside.
items.name: Matryoshka Shell

majorIds.Entropy: Meteor's speed is increased by 50%.

items.lore: It always returns a little weaker than what it was before. Perhaps someday, it'll be put down for good.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Crumbling Foundation

items.lore: This ancient Elven sacrificial mask contains only a sliver of its previous magic, yet the blessing of the Elven god Entia still greatly empowers those who don it.
items.name: Venison

majorIds.Combo Stomp: Landing directly on an enemy with Fierce Stomp sends you back into the air and resets Escape.

items.lore: These are congealed and rather gross, but they leave you with an undeniable bounce in your step.
items.name: Buoyant Balmorals

items.lore: These ancient, spark-coursing greaves are all that remains of the great thunder mage Ohms' favorite golem familiar after a dark force turned it against its masters.
items.name: Ohms' Rage

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Jinxed Coif

majorIds.Explosive Impact: Exploding gives an additional chance to deal 300% Main Attack damage in a radius of 5 blocks upon killing an enemy.

items.lore: You're seeing red... Time to see more of it.
items.name: Scarlet Veil

items.lore: Despite being a much smaller settlement compared to the mighty citadel of Rodoroc, the dwarven smiths of Thanos still can forge mighty products, such as these heavy diamond-alloy boots.
items.name: Anchoryl

items.lore: Tiny spikes lining the inside of these boots suppress the grey matter in the wearer's brain, enhancing their capabilities and making them capable of murderous and immoral acts while in this trance-like, numbed state.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Empathy Purge

items.lore: These leggings hold the interest of many researching the corruption, as they are the only documented case of a non-corrupt fusion of dark and light energy, made of pure twilight.
items.name: Bridge of the Divide

items.lore: It bears the visage of a great hero. Thank you for participating in the Festival of the Heroes!
items.name: Hero's Mask

items.lore: "I know the Beast may return one day...but these chains shall bind it for eternity." The inscription glows bright in the darkness.
items.name: Marius' Prison

items.lore: One of the few remaining standard issue mails that were used against the first hordes to emerge from the infamous portal over 1000 years ago.
items.name: Ragni's Mail

items.lore: Torn scraps of metal line the inside of these boots. They provide no protection, instead forcing a constant adrenaline rush while worn.
items.name: Broken Balance

items.lore: Once cursed by a druid who had his grove chopped away by a greedy Villager, it was then purified and mass-produced for sale as armor, to the druid's utter disappointment.
items.name: Sawdust

items.lore: There have been many attempts to create a reliable power system in Llevigar, and this plasma-charged helmet was reforged from a notable prototype.
items.name: Shinespark

items.lore: An otherwise healthy soldier once writhed and collapsed in the confines of an outpost. His autopsy was quickly canceled when military doctors noticed an unusually rapid spread of corruption in his corpse.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Brainbleed

items.lore: Each level deeper into the ocean only harbors stranger and more eerie creatures than before. Though their alien nature is disquieting, it is the way the trend sees no end that worries you the most.
items.name: Megalophobia

items.lore: For some, the psychological impact of the undead incursions becomes too much to bear. They leave their lives behind hoping to find solace, only to return as an undead themselves.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Woebegone

items.lore: This battered chestplate was once worn by the legendary Wynnic protector, Bob, during the fearsome corrupted sieges before he gave it away to an old friend. An air of melancholy hangs over it.
items.name: Bob's Battle Chestplate

items.lore: Only the strongest are able to survive Nesaak's unforgivingly harsh conditions. From the frigid temperatures to the vicious wildlife and grotesque corrupteds, life here can feel like challenge after challenge.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Inclemency

items.lore: One of the master tinkerer Cerid's greatest inventions, these odd gear-laced boots clink and chime with the sound of clockworks keeping its powerful magic dynamos constantly running.
items.name: Cerid's Ingenuity

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Bloodied Wreath

items.lore: These pure, snow-white leggings are rumored to have been crafted by the legendary ice mage Theorick. The people of Nesaak view them as cursed, seeking to destroy them in a bid to stop the endless winter surrounding them.
items.name: Winter's Essence

majorIds.Lightweight: You no longer take fall damage.

items.lore: Bending the fabric of reality to allow the wearer to take massive strides, these boots are rumored to contain rogue djinni to power them.
items.name: Seven-League Boots

items.lore: In the harshest reaches of the mountains, dusk brings a gentle magic to the air, prolonging the faintest vestiges of sundown before night truly falls.
items.name: Lingering Twilight

items.lore: Freshly slain foes in well below freezing conditions often provide enough warmth to weather the storm. However, this Corrupted seems to still be alive in some sickening way, draining life force to sustain itself.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Mutilated Corpse

items.lore: Occasional whisperings can be heard by the wearers of this stone mask, reforged from a phylactery of souls. Although not dangerous, staring into the eyes of the mask can bring fear of one's soul being trapped within.
items.name: Pelier

items.lore: This ill-fitting, bulky chestplate was never intended to be a chestplate at all. Rather, it is a broken fragment of an arm bracer, from the time of giants.
items.name: Giant's Bracer

items.lore: They look extremely bulky and uncomfortable...do they have a right to call it "enhanced"?
items.name: Enhanced Duskshield

majorIds.Escape Route: Frenzy and Time Dilation charge twice as fast but also decay twice as fast.

items.lore: To the victor go the spoils. To the swift, go the spoils of the victor.
items.name: The Scavenged

items.lore: The chains comprising the mesh are rusty and old. It looks terrible, especially with the newer metal added on.
items.name: Enhanced Assassin's Hood

majorIds.Juggle: Mutilate adds an additional 12 hits. All hits are reduced by -10%.

items.lore: The paintjob on the armor is incredibly garish. Who thinks to combine sea green, mud, hot pink, and neon yellow?
items.name: Enhanced Phosphene

items.lore: Many blacksmiths have tried to craft their products in this armor's image, but none so far have been able to capture the brilliance of these Bovemist-blessed greaves.
items.name: Holy Greaves

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Nevermore

items.lore: "After nearly getting trapped in an iron maiden, I figure I can study those mummies just as well from home." -Achper, Almuj Archaeologist
items.name: Springtrap

majorIds.Lunge: Hop and Leap's horizontal velocity is greatly increased.

items.lore: The dense, frostbitten trees hide danger at every step, too far to see yet too close to escape.
items.name: Lurking Peril

items.lore: Supposedly this chestplate belonged to a legendary paladin. The merchant has no explanation for why there are dozens of them.
items.name: Enhanced Zeal

items.lore: Materials of all sorts have been lashed together in this crude, blocky set of leggings. From darksteel to leather to rotting wood, each part is a perfect square. It has, so far, been impossible to recreate.
items.name: Chained Pixels

items.lore: The accursed mummy once wore this robe as a great pharaoh of the desert. It has long since rotted, leaving only a cursed shell of its former greatness.
items.name: Mummy's Rag

items.lore: Adding hard metal onto a religious cap seems blasphemous to you. The merchant disagrees.
items.name: Enhanced Salience

items.lore: Found in a mystically-charged Giant ruin, these snug boots recall fond memories, incite calmness, and provide comfort for the wearer.
items.name: Giant Step

majorIds.Cannulate: Sacrificial Shrine costs -5 Blood Pool to cast and health drain is halved.

items.lore: Rivers will run red in your wake.
items.name: Phlebotomy

items.lore: The merchant launched into a tirade on how the hardness scale of stones means nothing the instant you saw part of the boots flake off upon being touched.
items.name: Enhanced Gypsum

majorIds.Sun Eater: Failing to backstab an enemy from behind blinds them for 0.5s and slows them by 20% for 5s.

items.lore: Without your god, whom else is there to turn to but me?
items.name: False Idol

majorIds.Peaceful Effigy: Your Totem will last twice as long.

items.lore: What better excuse is there to sit in the shade and think about life?
items.name: Philosopher

items.lore: Some of the bones used to make the frame of the boots have crumbled. The merchant refuses to comment.
items.name: Enhanced Skeleton Boots

items.lore: Aside from the added plating, they look more or less intact. Somehow, that doesn't surprise you.
items.name: Enhanced Pickpockets

items.lore: The scratching in the walls is the only warning you get.
items.name: The Swarm

items.lore: "We're trying to dig up history, not horrors! What is wrong with this province?!" -Excavator Vade, WynnExcavation Site A Director
items.name: Dune Beast Jaw

items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Ancient Jazerant

items.lore: Ancient bones, fractured by corruption and the elements, have twisted themselves into these leggings. The armor shifts to fit its wearer before turning the bones inwards, inflicting unending agony.It's pulling towards something.
items.name: Mesoskeleton

items.lore: Apparently, gluing some feathers on top of the decorative armor wings is supposed to allow you to fly- so says the merchant, at least.
items.name: Enhanced Icarus

items.lore: They look like at once point they may have been fairly upscale. Now they just look like a metallic mess.
items.name: Enhanced Oxford
